Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Texas Jobs Market Outpaces National Growth Texas added in November and recorded an unemployment rate of 4.2%, outperforming national trends as the state's labor force reached a record 15.9 million workers. The Texas Workforce Commission reported the state gained 146,300 jobs year-over-year, more than any other state. While national job growth was the weakest in five years, with just 50,000 positions added in December, Texas maintained modest momentum. The state's 1.0% annual job growth rate topped the , though it fell below Texas' historical 2% growth trend. Large gains came from education, health services, and professional services, while trade, transportation, and mining sectors lost positions. Amarillo and Midland recorded the state's , while Eagle Pass and Brownsville-Harlingen had the highest. Houston Marathon Street Closures Sunday The Chevron Houston today, drawing over 300,000 runners and spectators. Major roadways, including Washington Avenue, Kirby Drive, Memorial Drive, Allen Parkway, and Avenida de las Américas, will be closed or partially closed. Neighborhoods such as downtown, Midtown, Memorial Park, Montrose, and River Oaks are expected to experience the most significant impact. The marathon's spans 13 pages and includes freeway ramp closures from 6 a.m. today. Former radio personality Sarah Pepper returns to emcee the event, one of her favorite traditions since her years connecting with Houston listeners. Last year, the marathon raised funds for over . San Antonio's Free Cowboy Breakfast Returns San Antonio Stock Show & Rodeo and Spurs Give will host the on Jan. 30 outside the Frost Bank Center. The event launches Rodeo season and the 2026 Rodeo BBQ Cookoff weekend, offering free breakfast tacos, coffee from 5 to 10 a.m., and free parking in select lots. The morning features live music, rodeo merchandise, and appearances by the Spurs Hype Squad. Those 21 and over can purchase alcoholic beverages, including beer and the rodeo's exclusive , starting at 7 a.m. Students and instructors from St. Philip's College culinary program will help with cooking, and the rodeo will donate to support the program. Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

| Peter,
Yesterday's death of GOP Congressman Doug LaMalfa, just one day after the departure of Marjorie Taylor-Greene leaves the GOP with a microscopic 218 majority - a two vote advantage over Democrats.
Given the voting record of Thomas Massie (R-KY), who Trump is currently at war with over the Epstein files, the GOP majority is now effectively a 1 vote majority.
The alarms are flashing bright for MAGA. Whereas yesterday Trump had the entirety of 2026 to continue implementing his agenda before potentially losing the house/becoming a lame duck president, that timetable now stands to be drastically reduced.
If the GOP loses one more seat (note - there are multiple special elections coming up) it is over for MAGA. The House becomes deadlocked or worse, they lose their majority. In response, MAGA is announcing extraordinary measures to cheat and shore up their House majority:

---
| | [](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001TnGQwLevEE_CbNGiVz_z2Or8z2Wj_9P-lEN_raQr2OwpbN5RAmU1rnS_yKENpChjXs6hh5qjiv6Kp9g_2aYn6mqirqt83UvE67H28peBdJ1Rp728fZ5pfiFyV5scO6hzSFhUMXe503jWp_fZirk3BAWZfPfbQ5vplhzLKuUan3YsarlQaBSQ4rURSBApvU7HWYw4iInK_1L1XdWbynr4qX-U3E0J1UVc8altqBBQpN8=&c=8q-dGfPx6iux3FdRXPNm_uLj16V2oud7Lpom6-fY2kAz2AJ8ZTsXoA==&ch=48wQFl9vOGdPg8agKljwvjlkFPF23m47BFlPJlMZn_CuS4g-s2wBIQ==)
---
|
Trump and the GOP are moving heaven and earth to ensure that no matter what they do not lose the House to Democrats. If they continue redistricting red states at this rate, which they have every intention of doing, these efforts will succeed. We will never hold the House again.
The only recourse Democrats have to ensure we are able to reclaim the House is by fighting back and redistricting in blue states. California and Virginia did it and now Colorado and other blue states must follow their lead if we hope to survive until 2028.
This is why Colorado Draws the Line is introducing the ballot measure (nearly identical to California's Proposition 50) that will let Coloradans vote to level the playing field, make CO bluer, and erase 3 MAGA seats.
The math is simple - if we don't match them blow for blow it's over. However you can do so at the link at the bottom of this email. | | == | Peter, Yesterday's death of GOP Congressman Doug LaMalfa, just one day after the departure of Marjorie Taylor-Greene leaves the GOP with a microscopic 218 majority - a two vote advantage over Democrats. Given the voting record of Thomas Massie (R-KY), who Trump is currently at war with over the Epstein files, the GOP majority is now effectively a 1 vote majority. The alarms are flashing bright for MAGA. Whereas yesterday Trump had the entirety of 2026 to continue implementing his agenda before potentially losing the house/becoming a lame duck president, that timetable now stands to be drastically reduced. If the GOP loses one more seat (note - there are multiple special elections coming up) it is over for MAGA. The House becomes deadlocked or worse, they lose their majority. In response, MAGA is announcing extraordinary measures to cheat and shore up their House majority: | | == | Trump and the GOP are moving heaven and earth to ensure that no matter what they do not lose the House to Democrats. If they continue redistricting red states at this rate, which they have every intention of doing, these efforts will succeed. We will never hold the House again. The only recourse Democrats have to ensure we are able to reclaim the House is by fighting back and redistricting in blue states. California and Virginia did it and now Colorado and other blue states must follow their lead if we hope to survive until 2028. | Across the country, Republicans are launching an unprecedented mid-decade redistricting blitz. Their goal is simple: rig the maps, erase Democratic seats, and manufacture a permanent MAGA majority.
They can't win on the issues, so they're rigging elections.
Our final line of defense against MAGA's election rigging are State Supreme Courts:
---
| [](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001X5i6HxextZdIHzVjCJzJwWW_bgsUDDJ7VGtMiggxjE4Pk6htoq6R7Pn7tOhHKocZN0BxipW6nV7L1IW2-WrjBAUo9TkdZqMWlp0OcE79ukdvUcqKigkI12i0AQPWYSxHcgBeKRTaMHQgXHfXl4XSO17Z9MTZ546p5jFqPVsKc_U_0s0m4bKaZhu2FUR4f6Helm1g8kFRnXsJxf0pmpj6Qg==&c=fsTRRpeP_Vgx1tiQHAncHzt4su-U62CrNVuQ-i94Jxtv5BtvNDKJmw==&ch=WgRbxfx8voo-gIPXAxc2LiHDr71ZDFHoZotsGapgB3H77p6G5Bkk6A==)
---
In 2026, the control over three crucial swing state courts will be decided in Arizona, Michigan, and Georgia.
If the MAGA seizes these benches, they gain total control. They will rubber-stamp illegal maps that wipe Democrats off the map.
In November, Defend Our Courts helped deliver a massive blowout victory in Pennsylvania's Supreme Court election. But with the House on the line and three swing state courts in the crosshairs, we must triple our efforts to make the same impact in 2026.
These are the most consequential races for Democrats next year.
[If we lose the courts, MAGA could seize control of the House for a decade to come. We need to get to work now, there is no time to lose. * ** ** You spoke out when they tried to silence him--even through violence.

And now the Deep State is throwing **EVERYTHING** they've got at President Trump.

If we stay silent, America First is finished. The Radical Left WINS. Our country is LOST.

But if we fight back, if we**STAND UP,** President Trump**WILL** Make America Great Again.

**That 's why we're assembling the Top 25,000 Patriots in the America First Movement.**

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The Trial of My Life Begins
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust
body:
There comes a point in every man’s life...
| Dear Fellow Patriot,
---
There comes a point in every man’s life when you wonder how history will remember you.
---
No matter what happens in my RIGGED trial, I know with absolute confidence that history will say: **_“Rudy W. Giuliani was a fighter.”_**
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=08a28aff5a2f486f87c3da6a5487a1f5&_e=0hIFMcmX57JIcmww9bYz_m1yNeu5UzWTW_Ir82fLF4mB-Km97lF4ZKd1dpLHnKorA-VWUhZLip4HioiT8r21a7LTQEyxRNdF4GG_P01gAdkLGtFjhhVM6cngrUBFFBT7gRxs8YkuyoP79MLofb2mThxmTKgaFGnCbOK9pzT1m7Y0gwyXzyFcRTA3o2IvGtQ2UTI6QoRcCFxW9Gf7s6d1sRex5RlHX1ZcYtJEFZ7hNeDwDA0oWC70L_bZafm1qbCmBzgORlsSIgtrSwIh67JbXUwGDs6KG2JvcteQqlWIOXxFFNgXvjRwZ1stodHps16Gvyjybcy2n_B_hyF3QSKQ6zzKVy9ur3rptsgOK4zS03_8nezZNxHLmH7qljP2UcUhZusPa4QDuGZ9MhqZBni99zpZPEA6u6J0Dk8Hn4HAOKbxpzvlIBELm9AkxoLx2PhDs-3wvdVFVLBXuTmQVWFzuRQiNqnty8pkhMvtpI8VTsGDSfGZB0DkIQZOfT4P3o7gO4rDt3oaFN0YCTnG_qO309CO5Xshx9rfxm3H1_5KxBA50XXQfX_YfKUFb2XejSb4BR9AhxmlPhcV8tWQYAOL0FzvVwRlsExFgiSukyjBtYY%3D)
__
---
**I fought the Mafia, I fought violent criminals, I fought corruption, I fought the Deep State agents who tried to frame and destroy my client – President Trump.**
---
_Now, at 81 years old, rather than fighting for someone else’s freedom and justice, I find myself fighting for my** _own_**._
---
**That’s why I officially filed a NEW _Defense_ _Trust_ in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me _more power_ to fight the Left’s FINAL attempt to imprison me for LIFE.**
---
_Fellow Patriot, I am going to be brutally honest with you: right now, I lack the necessary means to fully fund my Defense Trust. Trust me, admitting that is not my strong suit._
---
But to beat the bloodthirsty vengeful Democrats, I’m going to need every cent I can get.
---
_I’m going up against the machine that let James Comey and Letitia James off the hook – the machine that had me and the President ARRESTED in the most violent jail in America._
---
With your help, history will forever remember that we took on the machine – and _WON_!
---
_But, if you can’t give right now, then please just carry on with your day._
---
[**But if you can, please make a contribution to my brand new “Rudy Defense Trust” to help me fight for my freedom and justice and beat the Left’s FINAL attempt to imprison me for life.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=08a28aff5a2f486f87c3da6a5487a1f5&_e=0hIFMcmX57JIcmww9bYz_m1yNeu5UzWTW_Ir82fLF4mB-Km97lF4ZKd1dpLHnKorA-VWUhZLip4HioiT8r21a7LTQEyxRNdF4GG_P01gAdkLGtFjhhVM6cngrUBFFBT7gRxs8YkuyoP79MLofb2mThxmTKgaFGnCbOK9pzT1m7Y0gwyXzyFcRTA3o2IvGtQ2ggSna_7uVaSB-AKlFEHlTGeaKxDGzMwV1C0u8pPKcZ7So4SoR1GpoK10Jx1HdCMGnu6z-nQlN_sIg_z8ceEjtWyPrJqqAfaSB-7HTDj5CSt6D0b6JMR7-VRNdVUeobv9JC66WgeF6aQyOPOIBwIp7un33_jUMy8KaO-WCLbdr1JGg11fnVfjzzuriuQ0GowH5s7yKRXlnU8Ksk3sua0mFzF4-agpUHpwshKGs82Tg6lbHqplFSXUpwNX4fW1dM1ZkjwWihLeUP1t6w5j004ZMa9sjPu36tEDYe0hXT4HYTLQO2h-3bi2jza6Hvvk_yuMRrMyb2xA9aUO7qSNfC6nmr5uT6gRKUhVM7ohSkFvo3-GVIhvReITxBre_wJ6h0Z6dMAaRrrDEXdstMkZW2wWskarOMbPAe46RdWA89m0TIM%3D)

clean_body: There comes a point in every man’s life... | Dear Fellow Patriot, There comes a point in every man’s life when you wonder how history will remember you. No matter what happens in my RIGGED trial, I know with absolute confidence that history will say: “Rudy W. Giuliani was a fighter.” I fought the Mafia, I fought violent criminals, I fought corruption, I fought the Deep State agents who tried to frame and destroy my client – President Trump. Now, at 81 years old, rather than fighting for someone else’s freedom and justice, I find myself fighting for my own. That’s why I officially filed a NEW Defense Trust in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me more power to fight the Left’s FINAL attempt to imprison me for LIFE. Fellow Patriot, I am going to be brutally honest with you: right now, I lack the necessary means to fully fund my Defense Trust. Trust me, admitting that is not my strong suit. But to beat the bloodthirsty vengeful Democrats, I’m going to need every cent I can get. I’m going up against the machine that let James Comey and Letitia James off the hook – the machine that had me and the President ARRESTED in the most violent jail in America. With your help, history will forever remember that we took on the machine – and WON! But, if you can’t give right now, then please just carry on with your day. Thank you and God Bless you! Rudy Giuliani Rudy Defense Trust Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust

name: Team Ossoff for Georgia
subject: $5 to reelect Jon Ossoff in Georgia.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Good morning, Peter. [**We’re reaching out to ask you to give $5 to Jon’s reelection campaign today.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-jan26.wPRyEn&refcode=em260111-1-subs-b&t=1&akid=1412%2E5691347%2EVOU_U6)
**We’re asking for $5** because one of Jon’s opponents just launched a new round of attack ads and Jon is counting on our help to fight back.
**We’re asking for $5** because Trump’s Super PAC just raised $100 MILLION and Elon Musk has said he plans to go all-in for Republicans in the midterms.
**We’re asking for $5** because the overwhelming majority of donations to Jon’s campaign come from grassroots supporters like you chipping in to requests just like this.
Peter, we understand that a single $5 donation might not seem like it could make a difference against the hundreds of millions of dollars MAGA billionaires will spend on this race.
But these $5 donations early in the year are _incredibly important,_ they DO make a difference, and they add up FAST when we’re all chipping in.
[**Please, contribute $5, or whatever amount feels right, directly to Jon Ossoff’s campaign for Senate. We wouldn't ask if your support didn’t matter so much, Peter.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-jan26.wPRyEn&refcode=em260111-1-subs-b&t=2&akid=1412%2E5691347%2EVOU_U6)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[DONATE $5](https://act.electjon.com/go/2173?c0=ossoff-em-jan26.ccbWsl&refcode=em260111-1-subs-b&t=3&akid=1412%2E5691347%2EVOU_U6)**
---
****
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-jan26.ZJJ1in&refcode=em260111-1-subs-b&t=4&akid=1412%2E5691347%2EVOU_U6)**
---
****
Thank you!
Team Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23807%2E4449941%2EU_FWAT) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23807%2E4449941%2EU_FWAT) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71825?t=3&akid=23807%2E4449941%2EU_FWAT) [ **So, Robert Reich is calling on Congress to pass a Constitutional Amendment to abolish the Electoral College! We need 50,000 signatures from EVERY STATE before midnight to prove the public is behind him!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71825?t=4&akid=23807%2E4449941%2EU_FWAT) | [ADD MY NAME TO THE PETITION →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71825?t=5&akid=23807%2E4449941%2EU_FWAT)
---
* * *
If you were thinking of ignoring our urgent petition, here’s why you SHOULDN’T:
[**→ Donald Trump only became President in 2016 because of the outdated Electoral College.

→→ Hillary Clinton won the popular vote by nearly 2.9 million.

→→→ But the Electoral College overruled her victory!! **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71825?t=6&akid=23807%2E4449941%2EU_FWAT)
We can’t let something like that happen again! That’s why Robert Reich is SOUNDING THE ALARM:
[**“Twice in the last generation, the Electoral College has handed the presidency to someone who lost the popular vote.”** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71825?t=7&akid=23807%2E4449941%2EU_FWAT) | [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71825?t=8&akid=23807%2E4449941%2EU_FWAT)
---|---
The Electoral College is a BROKEN system, and that’s exactly why we need you to sign today, team.
[ **If every Democrat reading this signs our petition, we will reach our 125,OOO signature goal within minutes and gain traction for this urgent legislation in Congress. Please add your name immediately:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71825?t=9&akid=23807%2E4449941%2EU_FWAT)

name: Sharice Davids
subject: This email won’t be subtle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99185?refcode=em20260111-9920&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9920%2E614464%2EWf9NGI)
I know how it goes, Peter: a lot of political emails like these tend to beat around the bush for a while, before eventually asking for your support at the very end.
This _isn’t_ going to be one of those emails. Instead, I’ll be as direct as possible: **[I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots before Kansas Republicans try to gerrymander me out of office on January 12th.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99185?refcode=em20260111-9920&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9920%2E614464%2EWf9NGI)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99185?refcode=em20260111-9920&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9920%2E614464%2EWf9NGI)**
I’m sorry to be so blunt, but with so much at stake here in Kansas, this really isn’t a moment that calls for subtlety.
But if you’re on the fence, or you just need a little more information before giving (which I totally understand!), here are two good reasons I hope will make a difference:
1. **Trump’s gerrymander is settled nearly everywhere else... except Kansas.** We’re the final holdout, Peter. And that means we have Donald Trump’s full attention. But if this team steps up, chips in, and helps me take down Trump’s gerrymander on January 12th? It’ll send him a message even he can’t ignore.

2. **I’m no ordinary Congresswoman.** If you think Congress is full of too many out-of-touch, cookie-cutter politicians... I’m right there with you. My background on the other hand? It stands out. I’m a former MMA fighter, an LGBTQ+ Native American woman, and a first-generation college graduate. And Peter, I’ve brought those perspectives to everything I do in Washington.

**[Please, if any of those reasons convince you, will you rush a split donation before it’s too late? We can’t give extreme Republicans any momentum ahead of this gerrymandering fight on January 12th.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99185?refcode=em20260111-9920&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9920%2E614464%2EWf9NGI)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Sharice Davids and Heartland Patriots will process instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99186?refcode=em20260111-9920&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=9920%2E614464%2EWf9NGI) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99186?refcode=em20260111-9920&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=9920%2E614464%2EWf9NGI) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99186?refcode=em20260111-9920&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=9920%2E614464%2EWf9NGI) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99186?refcode=em20260111-9920&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=9920%2E614464%2EWf9NGI) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99186?refcode=em20260111-9920&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=9920%2E614464%2EWf9NGI) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99186?refcode=em20260111-9920&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=9920%2E614464%2EWf9NGI) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99185?refcode=em20260111-9920&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9920%2E614464%2EWf9NGI)

body:

We kicked the year off in a great way with the St. Clair County Republican Party - Michigan! Michigan's delegates are ready to work together and take Michigan back, and I'm excited to work alongside them to do so.
---
|
---
| | |
---
Thanks to the Saginaw County Republican Party for having me at their meeting! It was great to see so many familiar faces, and new ones tonight! A couple of those familiar faces were Xavier DeGroat and his father. I've had the pleasure of working with Xavier and the Xavier DeGroat Autism Foundation to help create reforms that helped our citizens with autism. One of the most important things we did was working on creating laws to help bridge the communication gap between law enforcement and drivers with autism.
---
| | | |
---
|
### ENDORSEMENT!

I'm honored to have the Endorsement and support of the 'Friends of Up North' PAC. I made it clear from day one, every part of Michigan matters to me, and I won't let Northern Michigan continue to be forgotten by Lansing.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: They can threaten my rank and my pension — but they’re not going to shut me up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123124698/594431557/-1451357237?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.11_Mark-Kelly-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90AC-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMjI5YzczMS1mZWVlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w_7KmTDqzZPHA7FSDhq44Orw03ScAPVWXN6KYkCqTiQ=) Team: Pete Hegseth decided he's going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension. I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head. My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. Pete Hegseth wants to send a message to every single one that he will come after them if they say something he doesn’t like. You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do. Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it. clean_body: You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do. = Team: Pete Hegseth decided he's going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension. I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head. My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. Pete Hegseth wants to send a message to every single one that he will come after them if they say something he doesn’t like. You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do. Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it. If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mark Kelly and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = Don’t give up the ship. https://secure.ngpvan.com/J13GCZORUEeOD88IEziwPA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/J13GCZORUEeOD88IEziwPA2]
Peter — Trump is launching an unprecedented attack on American media, seeking to SHUT DOWN essential programming, including NPR and PBS.
Fair and independent press is essential for our democracy, but Trump insists on attacking and seeking to DESTROY anyone who tries to hold him accountable.
Now, NPR and PBS are facing DEVASTING cuts due to Trump’s dictatorial crusade against the First Amendment!
34 MORE SIGNATURES NEEDED FROM 18326 BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Sign on now to STAND WITH NPR AND PBS and CONDEMN Trump’s crusade against the First Amendment > [https://secure.ngpvan.com/J13GCZORUEeOD88IEziwPA2]
CLICK HERE: SIGN THE PETITION >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/J13GCZORUEeOD88IEziwPA2]

We have to be very clear: this is the latest move by Trump to achieve his authoritarian, dictator-like ambitions.

Over the last year, we’ve seen Trump ignore court orders, illegally dismantle federal agencies he doesn’t like, and arrest political opponents.

Now, he’s trying to shut down our First Amendment rights and REPLACE trusted public media institutions with far-right propaganda. These are the acts of a dictator, not a president.

This is disgraceful, Peter: We need to ACT to make sure Trump’s authoritarian agenda BACKFIRES:

That’s why we’re launching an urgent petition to prove that millions of Americans stand with NPR and PBS and will NEVER allow him to destroy our democracy. We need 34 more signatures from 18326 to hit our 20,000 goal. Please sign on right away >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/J13GCZORUEeOD88IEziwPA2]

SIGN THE PETITION >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/J13GCZORUEeOD88IEziwPA2]

Thank you for taking immediate action.

Team Raja

But Republicans will spend MILLIONS to flip this seat red.

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Tell Congress to reject Trump’s $1.5 TRILLION war budget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
FIRST: Donald Trump has already used federal force against peaceful protesters – sending armed troops into cities across America.
THEN: Trump abducted Venezuelan President Maduro and his wife, launching a war of choice to bring regime change in Venezuela.
NOW: Trump is demanding a staggering $1.5 TRILLION defense budget – the largest military spending bill in U.S. history.
Before I explain why this is so dangerous, will you add your name right now to demand Congress reject Trump’s $1.5 trillion war budget? [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/trump-war-budget-petition?contactdata=FEUztSROafZ6y4iVq5pO0kaLOzcXWiK0XKHpjmsza8aMV7/XjTDZrzOOPzIM8MNQnCLjhdl38Vgh5EnLPaz3292Nlw/YnCMhktd6Ha+PpxvKDAZWYiJK2FMgUNTfe9yAgLfgSCG9yl/HwyY/ZNWNLz8J8MsmDvgS0kR0kSE8WkEuQt7D/I3prTkMTWC8zXN9]
https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/2009068145827565682 [https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/2009068145827565682]
SIGN THE PETITION [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/trump-war-budget-petition?contactdata=FEUztSROafZ6y4iVq5pO0kaLOzcXWiK0XKHpjmsza8aMV7/XjTDZrzOOPzIM8MNQnCLjhdl38Vgh5EnLPaz3292Nlw/YnCMhktd6Ha+PpxvKDAZWYiJK2FMgUNTfe9yAgLfgSCG9yl/HwyY/ZNWNLz8J8MsmDvgS0kR0kSE8WkEuQt7D/I3prTkMTWC8zXN9]
This NDAA would pour $1.5 trillion into the Pentagon – even as the Department of Defense has failed eight consecutive audits and legacy defense contractors continue to waste and overcharge billions of taxpayer dollars.
Let’s be clear: this money does not make us safer.
It enables waste, fuels endless wars, and gives Trump expanded power to militarize our streets and intimidate our own communities.
I believe in a strong national defense that actually protects people. But true security doesn’t come from tanks, tear gas, and troops in American neighborhoods or from dumb wars abroad. It comes from investing in healthcare, housing, education, and good-paying jobs at home.
Will you join me? Tell Congress to vote NO on Trump’s $1.5 trillion war budget. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/trump-war-budget-petition?contactdata=FEUztSROafZ6y4iVq5pO0kaLOzcXWiK0XKHpjmsza8aMV7/XjTDZrzOOPzIM8MNQnCLjhdl38Vgh5EnLPaz3292Nlw/YnCMhktd6Ha+PpxvKDAZWYiJK2FMgUNTfe9yAgLfgSCG9yl/HwyY/ZNWNLz8J8MsmDvgS0kR0kSE8WkEuQt7D/I3prTkMTWC8zXN9]
SIGN THE PETITION [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/trump-war-budget-petition?contactdata=FEUztSROafZ6y4iVq5pO0kaLOzcXWiK0XKHpjmsza8aMV7/XjTDZrzOOPzIM8MNQnCLjhdl38Vgh5EnLPaz3292Nlw/YnCMhktd6Ha+PpxvKDAZWYiJK2FMgUNTfe9yAgLfgSCG9yl/HwyY/ZNWNLz8J8MsmDvgS0kR0kSE8WkEuQt7D/I3prTkMTWC8zXN9]
Thank you for your activism, your courage, and your commitment to our democracy.
In solidarity,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!

Somali fraud is not the result of ignorance - it’s coordinated criminal activity. |
_**Fellow Patriot,[Have you seen what's happening in Minnesota under Kamala Harris' VP pick, Tim Walz?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=26906de07edd4378abb543bf02f17097&_e=Ot2uunz08KCY73e6btlmj0ppf7_WIt2A-xpqcgpKgpzACc5l4faWvKxqX7k4YsmQkbJUjMmEP8BEPyYAqv8KEC_NIYe0XyEeFMHlTmc81ZATVuqSYGcUIWv8Y31Q6FFngQ-T-pGn3vMbC5l7_gpeTLD9WXuQShUhI9huGFNom0q65rXePNIEA3e6l2yntBTJj49C1t1YJKPGxlgj5_0EH7xK2t60eOC5eW0_hMqDOxkXY1Liv-yWNx2SXThr3qKxoLDHwCPKSl17OUc7C29E5aJG4jrnPS0BYSKnJpPma5MJYGlRoAGjNRY-CovjaaGaKzEZWtUbLO5QQ-2P1aWvH0Pl58ceM6RV0l1AHk_sA3-DypHABRpaxw_i93JwAkQtfaEUB4tuCpCt0hYyyl8wRBhCNnJFDbmtYu8hHj4gTYl9lO0ML8gqe6Y8cSRzb8vkXVaGLzUJOuR6HGGep7g-9UL2Phs1NBepXnDOuS7mrW5-69pxRXJcQurD0SVpxv4vvrDmYFyysPr23M72WEZCulagejGaN98PL-uf4p3iZohGRO36w4w2K9f84GARvnudwZw1T3wk8kG_fUgU_ChydUA9nov7USQcxaW7RNigvxN9qPCn7rEopWW_7LB_qVmyzJPesarrEm1qkBKDaK9MOem5k5arzNZL4aOxRtUXRUhQ1Gdl6gAIJ4ra1ESpAqhU)**_

These networks exploit U.S. welfare systems, launder tax dollars, and operate with corrupt political cover.

**Those involved must be investigated, prosecuted, and removed from the USA.**

clean_body: This is personal. Not for anyone else.| | | | | Patriot, It’s Mike Rogers. I’m writing to you directly because I don’t know who else I can trust right now. I just left a series of meetings that shook me: the kind of conversations that never make it into press briefings or fundraising emails. I’m not supposed to tell you what I heard. I’m not supposed to share anything written. Please understand: I’m asking you humbly to read it immediately. Quietly. I wouldn’t come to you like this if I had any other choice. — Mike Rogers Michigan U.S. Senate Candidate | | | Paid for by Rogers for Senate

body:
We cannot allow this abuse of power to continue.

subject: Trump is screwed! -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey y'all, it's James Carville. I just looked over some polling numbers, and **if you're Trump, this is really bad news.**

His approval rating is crashing and burning, he's underwater in EVERY swing state, and now his numbers are even flatlining with his own supporters!**The wheels are comin' right off, and there's not a damn thing he can do about it.**

I'll just say it: **Trump is _screwed._**

**Now here's the juicy bit, y'all:** If Trump's numbers keep tailspinning (and I'd bet good money they will), _he could drag down the entire GOP with him._ Now, we gotta confirm these numbers _immediately._

**We're launching my _exclusive_ 1/11 Trump approval poll TODAY to prove that his numbers are circling the drain.** We need as many responses as possible to get an accurate reading, so please, tell us now:

**Do you approve of Donald Trump?**

name: Impeach Noem via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Justice for Renee Nicole Good, Impeach Noem NOW.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

This week in Minneapolis, an ICE agent fired through the window multiple
times and murdered Renee Nicole Good. Renee was a loving mother, a poet,
and a U.S. citizen. She was just 37 and leaves behind three children and a
partner who will never again hear her voice, feel her hug, or read her
words.

Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem raced to justify this killing and
spread lies on national TV. But cell phone videos and eyewitnesses paint a
starkly different reality.

We CANNOT let this stand. A member of Congress has filed articles of
impeachment against Secretary Noem for her lies, abuses, and violent
escalation – and we need EVERYONE to join in to overwhelm Congress with
pressure to act.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34933?source=email-20260111&t=1011&akid=10065%2E5885482%2E1Wma_Y ]Headline: Illinois Rep. Robin Kelly filing articles of impeachment for
DHS Secretary Kristi Noem

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34933?source=email-20260111&t=1012&akid=10065%2E5885482%2E1Wma_Y ]Add your name now to demand Congress impeach Noam.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34933?source=email-20260111&t=1013&akid=10065%2E5885482%2E1Wma_Y ]ADD YOUR NAME

This was not a one-off tragedy. In recent days, the Trump administration
warned that it was launching its "largest operation to date" in the twin
cities. Noem led the way to deploying 2,000 federal agents who started
grabbing people off the streets and outside homes and schools, violently
tackling members of the community. Neighbors woke to SWAT teams and
helicopters. Children headed to school in fear.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34933?source=email-20260111&t=1014&akid=10065%2E5885482%2E1Wma_Y ]Headline: 2,000 federal agents sent to Minneapolis area to carry out
'largest immigration operation ever,' ICE says

One thing is clear: if we don't act to stop this, the violence will only
increase.

Thousands have poured into the streets across the country in protest. But
as unrest spreads, Noem and the rest of the Trump administration are
doubling down on lies and disinformation.

Congress needs to see massive public outrage to act and remove Noem from
power, NOW.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34933?source=email-20260111&t=1015&akid=10065%2E5885482%2E1Wma_Y ]Will you urgently add your name to demand Congress impeach Noem?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34933?source=email-20260111&t=1016&akid=10065%2E5885482%2E1Wma_Y ]ADD YOUR NAME

We don't have time to wait as ICE continues terrorizing our communities.
Our Revolution and our allies just successfully pushed Avelo Airlines to
stop running its deportation flights and end its relationship with ICE.
Now, together, let's force Congress to confront this injustice and stop
the deadly violence. Together, let's show them the power of people
fighting back – for justice, for truth, and for Renee Nicole Good.

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=10065%2E5885482%2E1Wma_Y ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=10065%2E5885482%2E1Wma_Y ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=10065%2E5885482%2E1Wma_Y ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=10065%2E5885482%2E1Wma_Y ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=10065%2E5885482%2E1Wma_Y ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=10065%2E5885482%2E1Wma_Y ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20260111.gq4tI_&t=1007&akid=10065%2E5885482%2E1Wma_Y ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20260111.UOaCeE&t=1008&akid=10065%2E5885482%2E1Wma_Y ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20260111.DTo_AN&t=1009&akid=10065%2E5885482%2E1Wma_Y ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20260111.S-z896&t=1010&akid=10065%2E5885482%2E1Wma_Y ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=10065%2E5885482%2E1Wma_Y

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

Friend, Former Department of Justice lawyers just confirmed what we feared: the Trump administration is quietly assembling a national voter roll without any guardrails, transparency, or oversight. And the risks? Catastrophic. This kind of database – built behind closed doors – is a recipe for mass voter purges, discriminatory crackdowns, and widespread chaos heading into 2026 and 2028. It’s the GOP’s dream tool for election subversion. The good news? Democratic Secretaries of State are fighting back. With Trump allies pushing these efforts in courts, Congress, and state legislatures, we urgently need your support to defend the front lines. subject: The GOP House Majority just became a SINGLE vote majority

body:
Tuesday’s death of GOP Congressman has MAGA preparing to do something unprecedented to save their majority in the House.
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_Gos6jrbIFKpOjzRP1VzZWqdNlBUBq5zDDe5P26KPyf4HuMhp74q-aHxAc1MdHWGtGBeA3mDiSgYWW4tX1Ut75fpTK4fWtZOilNaCPmfl5OhmC4fqhSUQzzHYfwBoituguPu5KqN9cY7O2ro_rW8JfBVBjVW618ZlVjrIqkD2GFzhLrs6buTMgPCmRRk2B-jmYkUEL9J4P6NbinHrOkO7wj8SYnsbIP_&c=2XvQUE7Nym6weflV8TVQ9nRVwQuf9gBOhZUZtfmNOaezmn8sDgvgSg==&ch=vCBFqI_x1kXGwIBkz-rffMbjt-9rNQEvx1yAvoZri8khgbQy983wPw==)
---
Peter,
The sudden death of GOP Congressman Doug LaMalfa on Tuesday preceded by the departure of Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene on Monday has MAGA scrambling to prepare for a doomsday scenario.
Given the fact that Trump is at war with GOP Congressman Thomas Massie over his release of the Epstein files, the GOP House majority is now effectively just a 1 vote majority.
If they lose one more seat the House will be deadlocked and if they lose two Democrats reclaim the House. But MAGA is not prepared to go down without a (unfair) fight, within the last 24 hours we've seen them launch two last ditch efforts to save their majority:

* In a shocking move, yesterday Missouri's far-right Secretary of State threw out over 100,000 signatures from Missourians who were attempting to force a statewide vote on the GOP's push to erase one of MO's only Black Democratic congressional seats.

* And making matters even worse, yesterday FL Governor Ron DeSantis announced a special legislative session where they will remove 5 democratic House seats in time for the 2026 midterms.

In a matter of hours Democrats were all but robbed of six congressional seats.
MAGA is moving quickly and unless Democrats can match them blow for blow their redistricting initiative will cost us the House in 2026 despite what will likely be a historic blue wave.
Coloradans are refusing to accept MAGA one party rule enshrined through redistricting and are hitting back. Hard. Colorado Draws the Line is pushing through the ballot measure that when passed will erase 3 CO MAGA congressional districts (including Lauren Boebert's seat - CO-04).
---

Some give less. MAGA is moving quickly and unless Democrats can match them blow for blow their redistricting initiative will cost us the House in 2026 despite what will likely be a historic blue wave. Coloradans are refusing to accept MAGA one party rule enshrined through redistricting and are hitting back. Hard. Colorado Draws the Line is pushing through the ballot measure that when passed will erase 3 CO MAGA congressional districts (including Lauren Boebert's seat - CO-04). == If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == As we saw yesterday, in a matter of hours, MAGA was able to wipe out six Democratic seats. We urgently need your help to counter. -- Colorado Draws the Line | | | | == | | == | Donate by mail: Colorado Draws the Line == == | Paid for by Colorado Draws the Line. Registered agent: Rich Pelletier. | | | | | | Colorado Draws the Line | 1601 Arapahoe Street FL 10 | Denver, CO 80202 US |

name: Haley S.
subject: I’m not backing down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
This race could decide abortion rights

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1885%2E49239%2E3R-hgn)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11573?t=2&akid=1885%2E49239%2E3R-hgn)
---
null, it’s Haley.

I want to talk to you for a moment, not as a politician running for office, but as a woman from Michigan.
You may have seen the news: **An anti-abortion group announced they’re going to spend $80 million to help Republicans win the Senate. And they’ve named Michigan a top target.**
They’re launching ads and door-to-door campaigns to support MAGA extremists who back a near-total abortion ban – like my opponent Mike Rogers.

Let me be clear: I’ve spent my career fighting for reproductive freedom. I’ve stood with Planned Parenthood, I’ve defended access to care, and I’ve worked to restore the rights we had under Roe.
And I’m not going to stop now.

This is personal.

**_[If you’re with me, will you rush $5 to help me fight back and keep Michigan blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11574?t=3&akid=1885%2E49239%2E3R-hgn)_**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11575?t=4&akid=1885%2E49239%2E3R-hgn)
---
Here’s the bottom line: This race could decide control of the Senate. It could decide whether abortion rights survive in our country.

Mike Rogers has Trump’s endorsement and the backing of a MAGA Texas billionaire.
But I’ve got you.

So if you believe in reproductive freedom, I’m urgently asking you to **stand with me.[Rush $5 now to help us win this race and keep Michigan blue. ](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11574?t=5&akid=1885%2E49239%2E3R-hgn)**
With grit,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11576?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1885%2E49239%2E3R-hgn) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11573?t=7&akid=1885%2E49239%2E3R-hgn)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=8&akid=1885%2E49239%2E3R-hgn)

33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Good Morning America
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I’ll never forget...
#

Hello — it’s Gabby. Mark and I sat down for Good Morning America to talk about the 15-year anniversary of my shooting:
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q12026.IDrYd1&refcode=em26011-1-b&t=1&akid=11168%2E3935704%2EqGn3qp)
**[Before I share more, will you rush in any amount to GIFFORDS PAC today? Every dollar helps us reach more persuadable voters and build a strong coalition to stop gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q12026.IDrYd1&refcode=em26011-1-b&t=2&akid=11168%2E3935704%2EqGn3qp)
**[DONATE NOW](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q12026.IDrYd1&refcode=em26011-1-b&t=3&akid=11168%2E3935704%2EqGn3qp)**
After my shooting, Mark and I could have lived a life away from the public eye. But we are both public servants, and we couldn’t just stand by and do nothing.
As I went through intense rehabilitation — relearning how to walk and talk again — we were deciding whether to start an organization focused on gun violence prevention.
Then Sandy Hook happened.
Twenty innocent children’s lives were stolen. Six school staff members went to work that morning and never returned home.
I’ll never forget when Mark and I traveled to Newtown shortly after the tragedy to spend time with grieving families. We gathered in a living room filled with parents of some of the children killed in their classrooms, as well as family members of some of the school staff members who lost their lives.
After talking to every family there that day and tearing up at every picture of the innocent victims, I remember walking to a chair in the corner, collapsing into it and saying, "Enough."
A few short weeks later, we launched our gun violence prevention organization, now known as GIFFORDS. And after more than a decade of hard work, we’ve made gun safety a winning issue.
Since my shooting 15 years ago, states have enacted more than 820 new gun laws — from background checks and red flag laws, to industry accountability and funding for community violence intervention. These laws are making a difference.
**But we cannot let up. President Trump has made it clear that gun violence prevention is not on his list of priorities. That is disastrous.**
Gun violence is the number one killer of kids and teens in this country. Our president should be doing everything he can to stop this. Instead, his administration has only taken actions to make our country less safe.
Make no mistake: the fight isn’t over yet, and the headwinds we face are stiff. But if we all keep working together, I know that someday, there will be a future where we no longer live under the constant threat of gun violence. That is the mission at GIFFORDS.
**[If you agree that we need to end gun violence, then I am humbly asking you to pitch into GIFFORDS PAC today. It makes a difference when everyone is donating >>**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q12026.IDrYd1&refcode=em26011-1-b&t=4&akid=11168%2E3935704%2EqGn3qp)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q12026.zbDOw9&amount=3&refcode=em26011-1-b&t=23&akid=11168%2E3935704%2EqGn3qp)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-q12026.GT2W2m&refcode=em26011-1-b&t=24&akid=11168%2E3935704%2EqGn3qp)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-q12026.xIe8uE&refcode=em26011-1-b&t=25&akid=11168%2E3935704%2EqGn3qp)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-q12026.rrR0ZT&refcode=em26011-1-b&t=26&akid=11168%2E3935704%2EqGn3qp)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-q12026.yDhc38&refcode=em26011-1-b&t=27&akid=11168%2E3935704%2EqGn3qp)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q12026.zbDOw9&refcode=em26011-1-b&t=28&akid=11168%2E3935704%2EqGn3qp)**
---
****
With courage, ❤️
Gabby Giffords

**Please consider making a contribution of $5, $10 or anything you can afford to GIFFORDS PAC today. It all adds up when we’re all chipping in and that’s how we’ll create the change we need on gun safety...together.**
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q12026.IDrYd1&refcode=em26011-1-b&t=29&akid=11168%2E3935704%2EqGn3qp)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=30&akid=11168%2E3935704%2EqGn3qp) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Why I’m watching New Hampshire’s Senate race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Chris Pappas needs our support to keep New Hampshire blue and give Democrats a shot at Senate control.
Team — it’s Mark Kelly.
Before running for Senate, I served in the Navy and flew missions for NASA. I took those risks because I believe in this country and in doing right, even when it’s hard.
That’s why I’m reaching out today. There’s an open Senate seat in New Hampshire, and if Democrats lose it, we lose our shot at taking back the Senate majority. No margin for error. No backup plan.
**[That’s why I’m asking: Can you make a donation to help elect Chris Pappas and keep NH’s Senate seat blue?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20260111_1.C1v0g3&refcode=em20260111-1&t=1&akid=4507%2E582294%2EyqTVAh)**
Chris is the kind of leader we need in Washington: grounded, values-driven, and tough when it counts. He works across the aisle but never backs down when our rights and democracy are on the line.
That’s exactly why National Republicans are going all-in to defeat him.
If they flip New Hampshire, they’ll lock down the Senate for years to come and hand Donald Trump the power to roll back our rights and stack the government with loyalists. We can’t let that happen.
**[This race is one of the closest in the country — and it could decide everything. Chip in now to help Chris Pappas win.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20260111_1.C1v0g3&refcode=em20260111-1&t=2&akid=4507%2E582294%2EyqTVAh)**
**[Donate to Chris Pappas »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260111_1.8a0kLz&refcode=em20260111-1&t=3&akid=4507%2E582294%2EyqTVAh)**
Thanks for stepping up when it matters most.
— Mark
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20260111_1.C1v0g3&refcode=em20260111-1&t=4&akid=4507%2E582294%2EyqTVAh)
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20260111-1&t=5&refcode2=4507_582294_yqTVAh&akid=4507%2E582294%2EyqTVAh)**

Peter, I just filed notice of appeal in my case. Since day one, I’ve fought back against the Trump administration’s efforts to silence dissent, punish political opponents and anyone who speaks up, and enact their cruel agenda that hurts our communities. **This appeal is the next step in that fight.** I was charged by the Trump administration for conducting legally protected oversight at an ICE facility — I was charged and am being targeted for **doing my job.** And now I’m facing up to 17 years in prison because of the Trump administration’s meritless charges. Now, as I head into appeal, I’m asking you to stand strong with me in the fight against this administration. [I need your help. Will you split a donation TODAY between the Democratic Party of Georgia and myself to help me keep fighting and take this legal battle to the next step?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123133041/594457454/-1812015742?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_011126_B1_MCIVERSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmNhMWMxZS0wZGVmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ns_S2Lirlb70q5J77cKFblAJUJ6B9imwYv44xo9X0hU=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately to LaMonica McIver and the Democratic Party of Georgia:_

This appeal is for everyone who stands up to this administration’s efforts to stop oversight, operate in the shadows, and silence people’s voices. I will keep fighting to dismiss the Trump administration’s baseless charges against me, and I will keep fighting for all those who stand up for what is right.
**Even in the face of the Trump administration’s efforts to intimidate and silence me, I will not stop fighting — but I can’t do it alone. Split a donation between the Democratic Party of Georgia and myself to help my efforts to beat these baseless charges and win against the Trump administration.**
They want to make an example out of me and stop me from **doing my job for the people,** but I refuse to back down. I am in this for our community and our country, and I need you by my side.
This administration decided to come after me because I dared to stand against their cruel agenda. I will not bow down to the Trump administration, but I need your help.
This case is about more than just me — it’s about what this administration can and will do to those who disagree with them. We have to stand strong, together.
[Will you stand with me by splitting a donation between the Democratic Party of Georgia and myself today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123133048/594457461/-1812015742?amount=10&source=DPG_EM_FR_011126_B1_MCIVERSPLIT_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmNhMWMxZS0wZGVmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ns_S2Lirlb70q5J77cKFblAJUJ6B9imwYv44xo9X0hU=)
We won’t back down. Not now, not ever.
LaMonica

name: JanePAC Newsletter
subject: Your January edition of the JanePAC Monthly is here! 🗞️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
We have a lot to cover. Let’s get into it!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123133087/594457506/1328794144?refcode=ea.24b6bddd-0cef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ms=ea.24b6bddd-0cef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0YjZiZGRkLTBjZWYtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTExZjkwMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WMiLS_RoxifeBYmyNTq8kbPgPDNmHkOXT00pE1mFlao=&emci=7e0d3441-9aed-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&emdi=24b6bddd-0cef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ceid=4823105)
---
Happy New Year! Welcome to the January edition of **_The JanePAC Monthly!_** December gave us reasons to celebrate, and January is already reminding us why this work matters. We’ve got key election updates, inspiring climate wins, and critical news you need to see. Let's dive in! 👇
* * *
**🎂 CELEBRATING JANE'S 88TH BIRTHDAY ROAST & TOAST** Last month, hundreds of you joined us for Jane's 88th Birthday Roast & Toast — and what a night it was! Jane loved connecting with supporters across the country while celebrating alongside some of her dearest friends and our brave JanePAC climate champions. But the real gift was knowing every ticket supported JanePAC's work to flip the House and elect climate champions in 2026. Thank you to everyone who showed up for Jane and for our climate movement. **Here's to 88 years of raising hell and no signs of slowing down! ✊🌍**
* * *
**🌍 3,200 REASONS TO BELIEVE IN THE CLIMATE MOVEMENT** Last year, _The New York Times_ asked readers to share environmental wins from their communities, and the response was overwhelming: 3,200+ submissions showing climate action is alive and thriving across America. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123133088/594457508/992132802?refcode=ea.24b6bddd-0cef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ms=ea.24b6bddd-0cef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0YjZiZGRkLTBjZWYtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTExZjkwMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WMiLS_RoxifeBYmyNTq8kbPgPDNmHkOXT00pE1mFlao=&emci=7e0d3441-9aed-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&emdi=24b6bddd-0cef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ceid=4823105) The submissions ranged from small acts of everyday heroism to community-wide transformations — people rescuing wildlife, planting native species, greening homeowner associations, and building climate-resilient infrastructure. These stories capture the climate movement at its best: communities organizing, neighbors helping neighbors, people building solutions together. And while Trump dismantles federal protections, that grassroots power becomes even more important. Want to get inspired? **[Read some of these incredible stories and see what's possible when communities come together.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123133089/594457509/992132802?refcode=ea.24b6bddd-0cef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ms=ea.24b6bddd-0cef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0YjZiZGRkLTBjZWYtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTExZjkwMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WMiLS_RoxifeBYmyNTq8kbPgPDNmHkOXT00pE1mFlao=&emci=7e0d3441-9aed-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&emdi=24b6bddd-0cef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ceid=4823105)** | [**READ THE FULL STORY →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123133091/594457510/992132802?refcode=ea.24b6bddd-0cef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ms=ea.24b6bddd-0cef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0YjZiZGRkLTBjZWYtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTExZjkwMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WMiLS_RoxifeBYmyNTq8kbPgPDNmHkOXT00pE1mFlao=&emci=7e0d3441-9aed-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&emdi=24b6bddd-0cef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ceid=4823105)
---
* * *
**📅 SPECIAL ELECTION UPDATE**
Exciting news from Texas: **Christian Menefee, our JanePAC-endorsed climate champion, is leading his opponent by 13 points heading into the January 31 runoff for the 18th Congressional District.**
This is our first congressional race of 2026, and a win would send a climate champion who's already defeated Big Oil to Congress.
But with just 3 weeks to go and low runoff turnout expected, every contribution helps reach voters. **[Can we count on you to chip in any amount you can afford directly to Christian's campaign to help us secure this climate victory in Texas?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123133092/594457511/615746269?refcode=ea.24b6bddd-0cef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ms=ea.24b6bddd-0cef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0YjZiZGRkLTBjZWYtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTExZjkwMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WMiLS_RoxifeBYmyNTq8kbPgPDNmHkOXT00pE1mFlao=)**
[**DONATE TO CHRISTIAN'S CAMPAIGN →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123133093/594457512/615746269?refcode=ea.24b6bddd-0cef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ms=ea.24b6bddd-0cef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0YjZiZGRkLTBjZWYtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTExZjkwMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WMiLS_RoxifeBYmyNTq8kbPgPDNmHkOXT00pE1mFlao=)
---
* * *
**⚠️ TRUMP TAKES "DRILL, BABY, DRILL" GLOBAL**
While we're organizing to elect climate champions at home, Trump is exporting his fossil fuel agenda abroad with devastating consequences.
**Trump's Venezuela Oil Grab**
---
_ICYMI:_ After seizing Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro, Trump announced plans to take control of the country's vast oil reserves — the largest in the world. He vowed that US oil companies would move in, spend _billions_ to rebuild infrastructure, and extract Venezuela's oil to "reimburse" American costs.
**Climate experts warn this could produce 550 million tons of CO2 annually — more than the UK and Brazil combined.**
**“If oil production goes up, climate change will get worse sooner, and everybody loses, including the people of Venezuela...”**

_– The Guardian, 1/6/2026_
---
The world is already suffering severe heatwaves, storms, and droughts as a result of the climate crisis. Trump's war for oil will only accelerate climate catastrophe on a global scale.
[**READ THE FULL STORY →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123133094/594457513/618371877?refcode=ea.24b6bddd-0cef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ms=ea.24b6bddd-0cef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0YjZiZGRkLTBjZWYtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTExZjkwMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WMiLS_RoxifeBYmyNTq8kbPgPDNmHkOXT00pE1mFlao=&emci=7e0d3441-9aed-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&emdi=24b6bddd-0cef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ceid=4823105)
---
**Trump's UN Climate Treaty Exit**
---
Trump just withdrew the US from the UN Framework Convention on Climate Change — the bedrock international agreement every country in the world has signed for 34 years.
**America is now the only nation on Earth refusing to participate in global climate cooperation.** Think about that for a minute.
UN climate chief Simon Stiell didn't mince words, warning the decision will leave the US "less secure and less prosperous" as climate disasters rapidly worsen.
This is why our work at JanePAC has never been more critical. While Trump isolates America and rewards his Big Oil cronies, we're building a firewall by electing state and local leaders who will protect their communities from his dirty fossil fuel agenda.
[**READ THE FULL STORY →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123133095/594457515/1046953030?refcode=ea.24b6bddd-0cef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ms=ea.24b6bddd-0cef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0YjZiZGRkLTBjZWYtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTExZjkwMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WMiLS_RoxifeBYmyNTq8kbPgPDNmHkOXT00pE1mFlao=&emci=7e0d3441-9aed-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&emdi=24b6bddd-0cef-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ceid=4823105)
---
* * *
That's it for this edition of **_The JanePAC Monthly_**.
Thank you for being part of this movement. If you want to stay plugged in between newsletters, follow us on social media for daily updates and behind-the-scenes moments with Jane and the team:

clean_body: We have a lot to cover. Let’s get into it! | Happy New Year! Welcome to the January edition of The JanePAC Monthly! December gave us reasons to celebrate, and January is already reminding us why this work matters. We’ve got key election updates, inspiring climate wins, and critical news you need to see. Let's dive in! 👇 🎂 CELEBRATING JANE'S 88TH BIRTHDAY ROAST & TOAST Last month, hundreds of you joined us for Jane's 88th Birthday Roast & Toast — and what a night it was! Jane loved connecting with supporters across the country while celebrating alongside some of her dearest friends and our brave JanePAC climate champions. But the real gift was knowing every ticket supported JanePAC's work to flip the House and elect climate champions in 2026. Thank you to everyone who showed up for Jane and for our climate movement. Here's to 88 years of raising hell and no signs of slowing down! ✊🌍 🌍 3,200 REASONS TO BELIEVE IN THE CLIMATE MOVEMENT Last year, The New York Times asked readers to share environmental wins from their communities, and the response was overwhelming: 3,200+ submissions showing climate action is alive and thriving across America. The submissions ranged from small acts of everyday heroism to community-wide transformations — people rescuing wildlife, planting native species, greening homeowner associations, and building climate-resilient infrastructure. These stories capture the climate movement at its best: communities organizing, neighbors helping neighbors, people building solutions together. And while Trump dismantles federal protections, that grassroots power becomes even more important. Want to get inspired? | 📅 SPECIAL ELECTION UPDATE Exciting news from Texas: Christian Menefee, our JanePAC-endorsed climate champion, is leading his opponent by 13 points heading into the January 31 runoff for the 18th Congressional District. This is our first congressional race of 2026, and a win would send a climate champion who's already defeated Big Oil to Congress. But with just 3 weeks to go and low runoff turnout expected, every contribution helps reach voters. = = ⚠️ TRUMP TAKES "DRILL, BABY, DRILL" GLOBAL While we're organizing to elect climate champions at home, Trump is exporting his fossil fuel agenda abroad with devastating consequences. Trump's Venezuela Oil Grab ICYMI: After seizing Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro, Trump announced plans to take control of the country's vast oil reserves — the largest in the world. He vowed that US oil companies would move in, spend billions to rebuild infrastructure, and extract Venezuela's oil to "reimburse" American costs. Climate experts warn this could produce 550 million tons of CO2 annually — more than the UK and Brazil combined. “If oil production goes up, climate change will get worse sooner, and everybody loses, including the people of Venezuela...” – The Guardian, 1/6/2026 The world is already suffering severe heatwaves, storms, and droughts as a result of the climate crisis. Trump's war for oil will only accelerate climate catastrophe on a global scale. Trump's UN Climate Treaty Exit Trump just withdrew the US from the UN Framework Convention on Climate Change — the bedrock international agreement every country in the world has signed for 34 years. America is now the only nation on Earth refusing to participate in global climate cooperation. Think about that for a minute. UN climate chief Simon Stiell didn't mince words, warning the decision will leave the US "less secure and less prosperous" as climate disasters rapidly worsen. This is why our work at JanePAC has never been more critical. While Trump isolates America and rewards his Big Oil cronies, we're building a firewall by electing state and local leaders who will protect their communities from his dirty fossil fuel agenda. That's it for this edition of The JanePAC Monthly. Thank you for being part of this movement. If you want to stay plugged in between newsletters, follow us on social media for daily updates and behind-the-scenes moments with Jane and the team: Together, we are building a movement they cannot ignore. And we're just getting started. In solidarity, – Team JanePAC = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Team Cooper
subject: [Action Requested] millions of Americans will lose coverage
body:
Republicans lied about health care.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=322%2E124072%2ELQpvwH)
Imagine this, Peter: You trip on the stairs and land badly on an ankle. You think it’s a sprain — but it’s just not healing. You know you should go to the doctor. You know an X-ray is in the cards. _But you don’t have health care coverage. You’d have to pay out of pocket. And if you do that, you might not be able to pay the rent._ Peter, one accident, one trip to the doctor — it should never break the bank. That’s why leaders like Roy Cooper have fought so hard for so long to expand access to the affordable health care coverage that people deserve, including by getting a bipartisan deal on Medicaid Expansion for more than 700,000 North Carolinians. Now, millions of Americans will lose coverage under the GOP’s plan. **Look, Republicans in Washington swore up and down that they wouldn’t mess with our health care._They lied._ And we’re the ones who’ll bear the burden.** **[We have to stand up and fight for our RIGHT to health care, Peter. We’re looking for 1,000 signatures today to tell Republicans to take their hands off our health care. Add your name beside Roy’s>>>](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/em_RC_PET_healthcare_101125/?source=em_RC_PET_HealthCarePETRESEND_011126&t=7&akid=322%2E124072%2ELQpvwH)** | [SIGN ON](https://act.roycooper.com/sign/em_RC_PET_healthcare_101125/?source=em_RC_PET_HealthCarePETRESEND_011126&t=8&akid=322%2E124072%2ELQpvwH)
---
Thanks for taking action,
Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=322%2E124072%2ELQpvwH)**
[DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=322%2E124072%2ELQpvwH)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=322%2E124072%2ELQpvwH)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=322%2E124072%2ELQpvwH)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=322%2E124072%2ELQpvwH)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=322%2E124072%2ELQpvwH)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=9&akid=322%2E124072%2ELQpvwH)
