name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Texans want leaders who get the job done and stay true to their word.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Christian Menefee’s runoff election is on January 31st, and we need all hands on deck to help him win this election.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20260111-1&t=1&akid=3035%2E587540%2EbClcen)
Peter,
Back in November, Christian Menefee won the first round in the special election for TX-18.
**Now, Christian is heading to a runoff election on January 31st, and we need all hands on deck to finish the fight and send him to Congress.**
**[Will you split a contribution of $5 right now between Christian Menefee and Leaders We Deserve to help us power this runoff push?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260111_1_menefee.wvEJOt&refcode=em20260111-3035&amount=5&t=2&akid=3035%2E587540%2EbClcen)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260111_1_menefee.wvEJOt&amount=5&refcode=em20260111-3035&t=21&akid=3035%2E587540%2EbClcen)**
Christian has _never_ backed down from a fight — not when Texas Republicans tried to throw out the 2020 election results, not when corporations polluted Black and Brown neighborhoods, and not when greedy businesses tried to price-gouge families during hurricanes and natural disasters.
He’s the youngest and first Black Harris County Attorney, and he’s proven what bold leadership looks like. He has:
* Taken the Trump Administration to court — _and won_
* Held polluters accountable
* And protected families in Harris County from price gouging

Christian has proven that he has the courage to take on the important fights AND the skill to win those fights. That’s why Leaders We Deserve endorsed him and why Democrats need his leadership in Congress.
This runoff will come down to turnout. Runoffs are won by the campaigns that organize early, knock doors, turn out volunteers, and make sure every voter knows what’s at stake.
Our team has already been on the ground in Houston, helping Christian build the strongest possible turnout operation. But we’re up against a short timeline and runoffs are typically low-turnout elections. So we can’t let this race lose momentum, Peter.
**[Will you split a $5 donation to Christian Menefee and Leaders We Deserve to help him win this seat?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260111_1_menefee.wvEJOt&refcode=em20260111-3035&amount=5&t=22&akid=3035%2E587540%2EbClcen)**
Thank you for your support,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20260111-1&t=23&refcode2=3035_587540_bClcen&akid=3035%2E587540%2EbClcen)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=3035%2E587540%2EbClcen)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=3035%2E587540%2EbClcen)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Team Mandela Barnes
subject: Mandela’s plan for Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
Here are real problems, and real solutions
| Hi there, PBS has officially called this Democratic primary race “competitive.” **We’re on Team Mandela because he’s the best Democrat to beat MAGA extremist Tom Tiffany, and here’s why:** Mandela Barnes isn’t new to this fight. As Wisconsin’s former Lieutenant Governor, he’s led at the highest levels of state government and delivered real results for working families, such as improving Badgercare enrollment. And he’s running for governor with a clear set of values - and a real plan to turn them into action. **Mandela believes big money has too much influence in politics.** That’s why he refuses to take corporate PAC money and is building a people-powered campaign instead. **He believes healthcare is a human right** -- so as governor, he’ll expand BadgerCare to make sure every Wisconsinite can access the healthcare they deserve. **And he believes that if you work full time, you should be able to afford the basics.** That’s why Mandela supports doubling the minimum wage so working people can live, not just survive. This is the kind of bold, experienced leadership we need -- and it’s exactly how we defeat ineffective grifters like Tom Tiffany and move Wisconsin forward. [But Tom Tiffany has already raised $2 million in this race, and we need your help to fight back -- will you chip in $15 or whatever you can today?](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-jan26.E30PSJ&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_011126_B1_Competitive&t=2&akid=5767%2E196590%2ErY-ZU8) _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now._ | | | [DONATE $15 »](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6683?amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_011126_B1_Competitive&t=3&akid=5767%2E196590%2ErY-ZU8)

subject: Don't Diversify...Deepen!

| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)

---|---|---
The key to navigating today's uncertainty, I've argued, is to form a mosaic from the cross-current of the forces buffeting our world. Leaders need to focus on connecting dots across seemingly disparate domains. Siloed thinking around a single discipline (economics, for instance) is a sure-fire way to misinterpret today's chaos and experts who fail to broaden their thinking will struggle to lead effectively as they gain greater responsibility.
* * *
## [Why Breadth May Soon Trump Depth](https://substack.com/redirect/4626d540-fcff-4cf7-89c6-88e0eaf69c14?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| November 23, 2015
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4626d540-fcff-4cf7-89c6-88e0eaf69c14?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[There are no hard and fast answers in business anymore. Specialised knowledge is no longer as valuable as it once was when it comes to managing the complexity and ambiguity of the current environment. To future-proof their organisations, leaders must be increasingly sceptical, diffident in their projections, and ready to adjust their thinking. In this n...](https://substack.com/redirect/4626d540-fcff-4cf7-89c6-88e0eaf69c14?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/4626d540-fcff-4cf7-89c6-88e0eaf69c14?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Trump's return to the White House last year has brought about a dizzyingly realignment of global dynamics, and many leaders are caught in the swirl, unable to find a fixed point with which to orient themselves. The world feels out of control and disorder seems to be the new normal. Over the past year, I have tried to provide that fixed point, explaining what I see in terms of the realignment and the new axis around which the world will turn.
America's neighbors to the north are the latest example of what happens when this gyroscope is upended. A recent _Economist_ article entitled "[Canada's Armed Forces are Planning for Threats from America](https://substack.com/redirect/9468ff34-f4f3-4814-bd48-3aea51356a29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" details recent Canadian war planning that included possible defensive scenarios against America. Yes, you read that right: _**Canada is preparing for a possible war with the United States**_.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/af978cac-834e-4918-9fa7-5afde4e4b1c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[https://www.economist.com/the-americas/2026/01/07/canadas-armed-forces-are-planning-for-threats-from-america](https://substack.com/redirect/9468ff34-f4f3-4814-bd48-3aea51356a29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The article explains that Canada is changing its basic strategic assumptions, concerned that it can no longer cede defense of the North American continent to its southern neighbor. Misinterpreting the U.S. pivot from Europe, Canada fears it can no longer rely on the U.S. for its national security and that the U.S. might even be a threat to it. The Canadians are talking about increasing their defense spending, trying to build independent capabilities, and even considering a 400,000 strong civil-defense source modeled after the approach taken by Finland.
Mark Carney, Canada's prime minister, has been a cheerleader of this "diversification" strategy, and national security is not the only area where it is being applied. Carney has announced that [Canada will double its non-U.S. imports](https://substack.com/redirect/ba6ae60a-7448-4dd2-8edf-9591a5f4dc95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [diversify its critical minerals supply chains](https://substack.com/redirect/77ef6858-d3cf-4027-9585-bb26183535f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and he is [paying a visit to China next week](https://substack.com/redirect/bdbbad6d-25bf-4c97-98cc-1ad296421c4c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as part of his "pivot" away from the United States. As former UN Climate ...

Peter, The assassin's bullet that nearly took my father's life... the assassination of my friend Charlie Kirk... Those moments changed me _forever._ **Because the opposition showed us exactly who they are.** They don't want to debate. They want to destroy. They don't want to talk. They want us gone. **That 's why I wrote my new book -- _Under Siege: My Family 's Fight to Save Our Nation_ -- to tell the story of what it takes to stare evil in the face... and WIN.**

subject: I can’t forget what I saw in Mexico City
body:
A hospital bed can stop a child from being trafficked
There are no ICU beds left. That's what we're changing, right now.

| | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e0bd2b6fbd20406aa9825ce9d111c371&_e=D3P7EHgW0Do94S2Pftwp-UJYJUgdEj4f5TLM1D5yZchzmCp-0mq_Mtqna3REppznHSSluEArPWzGOTq34yVje0hyN7JtB92mnmM8tu3B_r4MTrY7Xl94eYMGPOl0-PizXrVgRvbu_rgzw5rsqnRdyGrc0vFJ25nc3OG-pXJ5UxvsJuCLwJZ1XBYHqnkTvoAc5bzICP6ko_BtbyL_WGfRjeHWvK11Wuu2gJCS9ME4X0Hw5tq7SH5JMcyY_pAVwWvsexNRXd4EqHtjKbInvhA3DFv9VE_DJUvGuEIA0INvSa0HuFsiIUB27edXO5nGXKwz6pO4dweTsM3W89XSf3wNh6465dap548T7eKVqNAhwg0qkcK77cEM4pPjo3PsP6XoJUJGd9etSebNCsGJuzpc8uvD7DlDf76oFgGolfpQ8IneqN_b1pTFhtxZVZYu2GocG-j8TgXdHI8jUXdDqAzsDVCijlf12fGzwm7fDKNptIHwtgMLNlhTsECqYtcLIdtIxOCR4nZbBSVLjs41f1WNNZyAMPWcbxdLwylfWolLQhPzM3c8vteo9dYi7MudYB5s1lT_Po9q59syLxDe7MIENNgxnmWC4scgThlp3ntW8Qk5ebTuMeaNj1QIdYi1sBqXiJ2e2KZcJS8E9pIpm8UbtiFR0piRp8WuRmcp2E0W7BmGoIXthXiiOpx6X_Wz6U-nj7UbBgXDZKNAEIIGyCF5-uJpWdm6XyokHNLCyscUrMvwP1U8VDD9-joB6QC8ET_MyZCZVLXP9cnZpTKdaInl66_QQYm_aRX-owBCpzkGj8EtntwrkMGGaVflleW5eSum)
---
Friend,
---
Mexico City is my home. It's where I was born, where I learned to believe in God's purpose, and where I first saw the kind of poverty and pain that can break your heart.When I speak with our partners there, the stories of children in need make my heart ache.You may know me as the producer of the blockbuster film _Sound of Freedom._ But what you may not know is that the film became the foundation for a massive movement, the **Sound of Freedom Foundation.** A humanitarian organization that rescues children from sex trafficking, supports their recovery, and helps stop exploitation before it begins. In hospitals across Mexico city, vulnerable children, including those rescued from trafficking and abuse, are now fighting to survive. But there aren't enough ICU beds to care for them.Some lie on stretchers or floors, waiting for a chance at healing that may never come.That's why I've set a goal:

**I want to raise $20,000 to deliver $200,000 worth of ICU beds** to hospitals and medical centers that serve God's children in Mexico City.
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=e0bd2b6fbd20406aa9825ce9d111c371&_e=D3P7EHgW0Do94S2Pftwp-UJYJUgdEj4f5TLM1D5yZchzmCp-0mq_Mtqna3REppznHSSluEArPWzGOTq34yVje0hyN7JtB92mnmM8tu3B_r4MTrY7Xl94eYMGPOl0-PizXrVgRvbu_rgzw5rsqnRdyGrc0vFJ25nc3OG-pXJ5UxvsJuCLwJZ1XBYHqnkTvoAc5bzICP6ko_BtbyL_WGfRjeHWvK11Wuu2gJCS9ME4X0Hw5tq7SH5JMcyY_pAVwWvsexNRXd4EqHtjKbInvhA3DFv9VE_DJUvGuEIA0INvSa3KKpoVi-4WvET4FZyEoqPtLgs2tjlzFRt8ts3w13PsP2dcjzwyyIl-T7i4Jbq7tL0It8xvp4qHYiPzmufBgNn5J2pybzmNwIppezLPDaqRV53TX01-728WNySajO8QCf_IWnOFIL8qdLNwOjW-KoD6rLiEqjSJ0O01l_hRAXm6qSaiYQcpDuqdd2W2eUR5V1BueKWj5Kqhd93q4fl0J3l0kaxw_aJYw3nn58v6EvslBHUx7dSwhabJvF4zYuPRSvHzBxYXo1RvxDRCcY3BXlvIrji5D3mcF0gsU1zUBuSYQ1b_ShOnanCSacdUXnEQb1Wk-8kVyYOxM5Eak7y3BiIAYlHOs59wZwLZSkN7nYDSntz-JCCxLAMQKW11ArDbHa0-Fek6qHEpd3De_OqmgJDAW6Zl1jP6GHAIE4n-0a5IK9NGu4i-yf4ETqitjQzW8b_3tchWuwPbdXKDOY_oYdUIXS_Mm0uIU14T1nayr_ydQRVklQoK585eVFeXE2JUt97yWIIJayJmPLtjZMYLJOMe)

clean_body: A hospital bed can stop a child from being trafficked There are no ICU beds left. That's what we're changing, right now. | | | Friend, Mexico City is my home. It's where I was born, where I learned to believe in God's purpose, and where I first saw the kind of poverty and pain that can break your heart.When I speak with our partners there, the stories of children in need make my heart ache.You may know me as the producer of the blockbuster film Sound of Freedom. But what you may not know is that the film became the foundation for a massive movement, the Sound of Freedom Foundation. A humanitarian organization that rescues children from sex trafficking, supports their recovery, and helps stop exploitation before it begins. In hospitals across Mexico city, vulnerable children, including those rescued from trafficking and abuse, are now fighting to survive. But there aren't enough ICU beds to care for them.Some lie on stretchers or floors, waiting for a chance at healing that may never come.That's why I've set a goal: I want to raise $20,000 to deliver $200,000 worth of ICU beds to hospitals and medical centers that serve God's children in Mexico City. These beds are lifelines. They are where a fragile heartbeat stabilizes, where a child's breathing grows stronger, where healing happens. Every $1 you give becomes $10 of real medical value.How?Because through the Sound of Freedom Foundation's partnerships with trusted humanitarian distributors, we're able to secure bulk discounts on high-need medical equipment. That means every dollar raised helps unlock $10 worth of ICU beds, monitors, and lifesaving hospital supplies. enough to care for children who are sick, weak, and desperately in need of help.$25 -> provides $250 worth of ICU equipment and supplies. $50 -> provides $500 toward children's ICU beds. $100 -> provides $1,000 in needed ICU supplies. $250 or more -> helps equip an entire hospital ward for rescued children. When these beds arrive, they will go straight into hospitals that have been praying for help, to doctors who refuse to give up, and nurses who comfort frightened children through the night.And the impact doesn't end there. Because when desperate families can access medical care for their children, they no longer face the unthinkable choice of selling a son or daughter just to survive.In communities where poverty and sickness make children vulnerable to traffickers, a single hospital bed can mean the difference between a child staying with their loving family or being trafficked and abused. This is what we can change together.We have the plan. We have the partners. But this mission can't launch without you.Friend, the next few days will decide how many children we can help, how many will have a bed instead of the floor, and hope instead of fear. If we reach our goal, those hospital rooms will be transformed. The caregivers will have the tools they need. And the children will finally be able to rest, to heal, and to live, safe from the predators who prey on desperation.If we fall short, vulnerable children will not receive the medical care they need and their families may be forced into the kind of impossible decisions that result in more children being trafficked and exploited for profit. For God's children, Eduardo Verastegui Sound of Freedom, Producer For the Sound of Freedom Foundation 6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074

When Pete Hegseth released his demands of the press, reporters with integrity did the right thing and walked out. No credible news agencies would have agreed to what he had asked. But now, _far-right media and conspiracy theorists hold those press badges._
Congress, thanks to spineless Republicans, has freely given up its oversight powers, and the press’s access to the largest federal agency has been destroyed. There is no one questioning our military and no one fighting for our troops.
**Our men and women in uniform deserve a Congress that will protect them from fighting in endless wars over oil, and reporters in the Pentagon who will hold our government to the highest of standards.**
I know what it takes to hold the government’s feet to the fire. I did it every day as a broadcast journalist, and I am ready to bring my persistence and experience to Washington. We need fighters in Congress, not Trump puppets like my opponent, Gina Swoboda.
**[I am ready to hold this far-right administration accountable for its extreme anti-democratic actions, but I need your help to get there. In this week's "Shuster's Weekly Wrap-Up" video, [David Shuster](https://open.substack.com/users/16891317-david-shuster?utm_source=mentions) walks viewers through a brutal news cycle while underscoring an often-overlooked truth: democracy is under strain, but it is not powerless--_yet_.
David opens with a rare moment of good news out of Washington. A bipartisan discharge petition forced a House vote extending Affordable Care Act tax credits for three years, passing with 17 Republicans joining Democrats. It's a reminder that pressure still works--and that Republican leadership, particularly Senate Minority Leader Thune, is now on the clock to allow a vote that would almost certainly pass in the Senate.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/60176d7f-d15a-494b-97e4-e05c4f9b9fac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
From there, the focus shifts to a far more ominous development: the Senate advancing a resolution to restrict Donald Trump's war powers. Five Republicans crossed party lines to curb the president's ability to deploy troops--specifically in Venezuela, but with broader implications. Trump's furious response, including a chilling _New York Times_ interview in which he claimed only his "own morality" could restrain him, sets off alarm bells. David doesn't mince words: unchecked power paired with visible cognitive decline is a dangerous mix.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/60176d7f-d15a-494b-97e4-e05c4f9b9fac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The video then turns devastating. An ICE agent shot and killed 37-year-old Renee Good, a tragedy captured in part on the agent's own phone. David dismantles Vice President J.D. Vance's claim that the agent enjoys "absolute immunity," calling it legally false--and chillingly authoritarian. The distinction is clear: absolute immunity doesn't exist under U.S. law. It exists under fascism.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/60176d7f-d15a-494b-97e4-e05c4f9b9fac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Local resistance is growing. Minneapolis Mayor Jacob Frey publicly ordered ICE out of his city, stating plainly that federal enforcement actions are making communities less safe, not more.
David then exposes another crack in Trump's support base: even fringe loyalists are defecting. The Trump Justice Department has admitted to releasing just 1% of the Epstein files--and that refusal was enough to drive away figures like the so-called "QAnon Shaman." The implication is devastating: when even conspiracy die-hards walk away, the rot is visible to everyone.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/60176d7f-d15a-494b-97e4-e05c4f9b9fac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The episode closes with David's trademark dark humor--an AI-generated parody of Trump's Venezuela rhetoric--before he lands on a vital note: keep laughing, stay clear-eyed, and don't look away. Accountability still exists, but only if people are willing to demand it.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/60176d7f-d15a-494b-97e4-e05c4f9b9fac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
You're currently a free subscriber to [Blue Amp Media](https://substack.com/redirect/d92a0cda-0936-4c2f-b31d-4da57eb11b08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). name: Ilhan Omar
subject: ICE denied me entry.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Yesterday I went down to the ICE HQ in Minneapolis to conduct oversight as a member of Congress
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=2024%2E791427%2EttpKuP)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-jan26.B2OwkJ&refcode=em260111-1-180&t=2&akid=2024%2E791427%2EttpKuP)
Friend — Yesterday I went down to an ICE federal facility in Minneapolis to conduct oversight as a member of Congress and seek accountability as ICE terrorizes my community.
What happened next will not surprise you:
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/4777?t=3&akid=2024%2E791427%2EttpKuP)
**This is a blatant and illegal attempt to obstruct members of Congress from doing their job.** And it’s just another example of ICE acting as a runaway, unaccountable, secret police force operating outside of the law.
They don’t answer to Congress. They don’t answer to the Courts. They don’t answer to state officials or law enforcement. And they certainly don’t answer to the American people, who they have harassed, detained, beaten, and shot at on a daily basis.
**No, ICE answers only to the President — a personal squad of thugs ready to be unleashed on the President's political opponents.**
Just look at how they have refused to cooperate with Minnesota on an investigation into the murder of Renee Good. They care more about protecting their own than seeking truth, justice, and accountability for an American citizen who was killed in cold blood.
It’s fascism, it’s authoritarianism, and the American people cannot and will not stand for it.
**[If we are to protect our democracy as we slide down this slippery slope, it’s absolutely imperative that we meet MAGA and the far-right in every state and every district across the country with a tidal wave of opposition. Please, chip in today to power our movement as we fight back here in Minneapolis and work to protect our neighbors from ICE’s attacks.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-jan26.B2OwkJ&refcode=em260111-1-180&t=4&akid=2024%2E791427%2EttpKuP)**

****
We all have a role to play in building the movement to end this insanity.
I will continue to do what I can, with all the power I have as a member of Congress, to fight back. I’m counting on you to do your part too, and help us defeat Trump’s extreme agenda and out-of-control presidency.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

I’m writing to you directly because I don’t know who else I can trust right now. I just left a series of meetings that shook me: the kind of conversations that never make it into press briefings or fundraising emails.

I’m not supposed to tell you what I heard.

I’m not supposed to share anything written.

[**But I wrote a personal note anyway... and it’s for you. clean_body: What I wrote cannot leak.| | | | | Patriot, It’s Mike Rogers. I’m writing to you directly because I don’t know who else I can trust right now. I just left a series of meetings that shook me: the kind of conversations that never make it into press briefings or fundraising emails. I’m not supposed to tell you what I heard. I wouldn’t come to you like this if I had any other choice. — Mike Rogers Michigan U.S. Senate Candidate | | | Paid for by Rogers for Senate

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Team Moulton
subject: The calendar flipped. The issues didn’t.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
A new year doesn’t fix broken leadership.

| |
---
Friend, As the new year begins, we’re still seeing the same pattern from Trump and his allies: avoiding accountability, pushing the limits of power, and treating norms and laws as optional when they get in the way. Just days into 2026, Trump authorized an operation in Venezuela that led to the capture of President Nicolás Maduro, without congressional approval, and without a clear explanation or next steps to the American people. At the same time, Trump has revived talk of “acquiring” Greenland, even floating military options and rattling our NATO allies, putting decades of trust and cooperation at risk. That’s exactly why this campaign exists. Not to chase every headline, but to build leadership strong enough to confront Trump directly, hold him accountable, and offer a real alternative rooted in responsibility and results. **[If you agree that this moment calls for leadership willing to stand up and push back, will you make a contribution today to help keep this campaign moving forward?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123140205/594483193/2090747700?refcode=260111_tm_sametrump_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGQ2YTM0Zi0yYmVmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HhhGFDsKTzdVUf96f7XyoSnBFAWYNg0raRfZGbyLO-I=)** | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123140206/594483194/1375639745?amp;refcode=260111_tm_sametrump&refcode=260111_tm_sametrump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGQ2YTM0Zi0yYmVmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HhhGFDsKTzdVUf96f7XyoSnBFAWYNg0raRfZGbyLO-I=)

null, Trump’s Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is facing increased criticism from both sides of the aisle – and for good reason:
* A Pentagon watchdog says Hegseth may have **endangered U.S. troops** by leaking classified military strike plans via a messaging app.

* Hegseth ordered a strike that killed 9 people at sea, and then a second strike **killed unarmed survivors** clinging to the wreckage – potentially committing a serious war crime.

* **Hegseth kicked journalists out of the Pentagon** and replaced them with MAGA influencers. Now, _The New York Times_ is suing him over unconstitutional media restrictions.

Some Republicans in Congress are questioning whether Hegseth can stay in his role.

name: Katie Porter
subject: Multiple huge donations from my billionaire opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
He knows he can use his obscene wealth to completely blanket the airwaves with TV ads.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40690%2E3422442%2EPrqpTq)
Peter,
**$28 million.**
That’s how much our billionaire opponent has donated to his own campaign.
Here’s the part that worries me. _He hasn’t stopped._
After giving his campaign an initial $20 million on launch, he must’ve seen that it worked—so he doubled down with another $8 million dollar contribution.
**He is trying to buy this election.** This wasn’t a one-off donation to make a splash in this race. He knows he can use his obscene wealth to completely blanket the airwaves with TV ads—which he’s already spent upwards of $17 million on.
We can’t let him get away with this. I spent my time in Congress standing up to rich people trying to get their way, **and I’m sure as hell not going to stop now.**
We have to show him _the most important governor’s office in the country is not for sale._
**[This campaign has something more valuable than billions of dollars: thousands of supporters who will power us to victory. That’s why I’m counting on you, Peter. Can you chip in $5 or more to my campaign today?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260111_1_ak.VowWrd&refcode=em20260111-40690&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40690%2E3422442%2EPrqpTq)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260111_1_ak.VowWrd&refcode=em20260111-40690&t=22&akid=40690%2E3422442%2EPrqpTq)
Thank you,
Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260111-40690&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=40690_3422442_PrqpTq&akid=40690%2E3422442%2EPrqpTq)**

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Trump + Hegseth
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
This is the full weight of the federal government bearing down on Mark Kelly, personally. They want to crush Mark to show how “strong” they are. But it’s not just about him.
#

Team —
We know we’ve been in touch more than usual, and we appreciate you bearing with us. It’s a lot to ask, but we hope you see these emails as an important reminder of how important you are to Mark.
And today, we really need you to chip in. Please, let us explain why:
**_FIRST:**_ Mark stated the law. For doing that, the President of the United States called for Mark to be arrested, tried for sedition, and hanged. The Secretary of Defense threatened him with court-martial.
**_THEN:**_ Hegseth formally censured Mark, and is threatening to demote Mark and reduce his pension. Mark earned his rank and retirement through 25 years of service and sacrifice, and they want to take it away because of something he said.
**_NOW:**_ Mark needs your help, and that is a serious understatement.
This is the full weight of the federal government bearing down on Mark Kelly, personally. They want to crush Mark to show how “strong” they are. But it’s not just about him.
This is a sustained attack on free speech, on democracy, and on the truth itself. They want their own reality, and to intimidate the entire country into silence and obedience.
Mark is out there for all of us right now, and we can’t let him down.
[**Please, add a donation and help Mark stand against everything Trump and the White House are throwing at him.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-jan26-dod.oeiXQe&refcode=em260111-1-90&t=1&akid=6329%2E6688874%2EMAIvDc)

Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. clean_body: This is the full weight of the federal government bearing down on Mark Kelly, personally. They want to crush Mark to show how “strong” they are. But it’s not just about him. Team — We know we’ve been in touch more than usual, and we appreciate you bearing with us. It’s a lot to ask, but we hope you see these emails as an important reminder of how important you are to Mark. And today, we really need you to chip in. Please, let us explain why: FIRST: Mark stated the law. For doing that, the President of the United States called for Mark to be arrested, tried for sedition, and hanged. The Secretary of Defense threatened him with court-martial. THEN: Hegseth formally censured Mark, and is threatening to demote Mark and reduce his pension. Mark earned his rank and retirement through 25 years of service and sacrifice, and they want to take it away because of something he said. NOW: Mark needs your help, and that is a serious understatement. This is the full weight of the federal government bearing down on Mark Kelly, personally. They want to crush Mark to show how “strong” they are. But it’s not just about him. This is a sustained attack on free speech, on democracy, and on the truth itself. They want their own reality, and to intimidate the entire country into silence and obedience. Mark is out there for all of us right now, and we can’t let him down. If we don’t meet this moment, the consequences will be real for working families. | | | Friend — I’m reaching out quickly because in just a few days, I’ll be heading into the legislative session. And once that happens, _I have to stop fundraising._ That makes right now our last chance to raise what we need to defend this seat and **keep Virginia blue.** Republicans are already spending heavily, targeting swing districts like ours, and using Virginia as a testing ground for their extremist agenda. clean_body: If we don’t meet this moment, the consequences will be real for working families. | | | Friend — I’m reaching out quickly because in just a few days, I’ll be heading into the legislative session. And once that happens, I have to stop fundraising. That makes right now our last chance to raise what we need to defend this seat and keep Virginia blue. Republicans are already spending heavily, targeting swing districts like ours, and using Virginia as a testing ground for their extremist agenda. If we don’t meet this moment, the consequences will be real for working families, for reproductive freedom in the state, and for progress across the country. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thank you for standing with me. — Elizabeth | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . subject: What my Republican opponents can do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Wisconsin, wisdems
body:
| | | | Derek, You probably get a lot of emails like this one, but I want to explain why [I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Battleground Wisconsin and why it’s so important right now.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquN1aoJYYSN4wWuHwHSdnJrmuDgHc1E-0aIgyIJt7wBnjyki3HWzTC243_MzH1hTxNaMpK4kfzFoZGkdesl3YvDhWW7Y7slGBijUppLOBuMzeajjs7ReXvJkAXTm-zldz_tPEb1I5sBRG7dnXSnwwTZsJrOZasDmotuzYaItu_9KUCmOf8X_vybyzILWs4PfKek-eCgvodlOsDXbwjwQa-8FkeuA4VpZ8ylKWBp1pXI70yfNqJHLliStSF84rX9Z1CRUcCRQd-8kaJ3uput7U7pg4AhgZblPJCwbZ8DgDG1N7wO5YcoZtswnRAWE8aRR29JwLBYcFgHIVefRrhMmFUGI1mpUCPZgpTMKNn16ELsEi0YUUn0Ckym8PZq4TN51W2sDaupyGHB8HYdBmZfOZX8/4n7/6K_evIW-TjOSQntLELdhBg/h0/h001.bG7IOHs2hRX0AfTHGkXGvQgoFz6sRHB4hxSG5Egr7dA) 2026 is an election year in Maryland — but for nearly _three months,_ starting on Wednesday, I won’t be allowed to raise a single dollar so that we can focus on the important work of driving progress forward for Marylanders. That’s a real challenge for my team. These early months are when most campaigns build their momentum. It’s when they get the fuel for their organizing, advertising, and ability to define the race. **And that’s what my Republican opponents will be doing the entire time my team has their hands tied.** While we’re in the fundraising freeze, Republicans will spend every day raising money, meeting with Trump’s advisors, and collecting massive checks from special-interest donors who want to flip this seat. That’s why the short time we have left is critical. We’ve got less than a week to bring in the resources we need to stay competitive. There’s no “catching up” later — _only a sprint that starts right now._ [If you can split a donation of $10, $25, or any amount between Battleground Wisconsin and me before the clock runs out, it will help us fight against anything Republicans throw our way in 2026. Will you step up before it’s too late?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquN1aoJYYSN4wWuHwHSdnJrmuDgHc1E-0aIgyIJt7wBntNSVGXv4XQ0C5EwC_2KhO7taVbqJRtHodnHZ7ZkJOE4XbGF6C3c9nXC1YJxi4UAxfEiubn77c8LZ6k415TD-lqVB0cwbCIqIvwAlbH9Kn8sY_2xZ_KbwEvYI_Zu6sJt4kPiOe4QxtTPw8lj6-fVI8GCitIxxq6U_Nu26sgJXZ60AfWzpx7ITc1jznx4FSF3cQDfgPR3c6QE8h5I_40ofq6HI_xS8vfLRqelYZjX_45CYlJ70PElvdAWPjwugtAB8_pxZcOzfoTugpnWTZC4j2UoF_LOi3HZAf2j1gqPGcXQhuyr0Y96EwWrYbhcRIURCiSgdB6jh_wk0bt25TNkG2lEvfXgRnpSDcMo_zLgVCHg/4n7/6K_evIW-TjOSQntLELdhBg/h1/h001.abZRPForcgbOb4LpIZKNQu3UQuUciE3xS8wzmNx1C-c) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and split between the Battleground Wisconsin and Wes Moore:

clean_body: | | | | Derek, You probably get a lot of emails like this one, but I want to explain why 2026 is an election year in Maryland — but for nearly three months, starting on Wednesday, I won’t be allowed to raise a single dollar so that we can focus on the important work of driving progress forward for Marylanders. That’s a real challenge for my team. These early months are when most campaigns build their momentum. It’s when they get the fuel for their organizing, advertising, and ability to define the race. And that’s what my Republican opponents will be doing the entire time my team has their hands tied. While we’re in the fundraising freeze, Republicans will spend every day raising money, meeting with Trump’s advisors, and collecting massive checks from special-interest donors who want to flip this seat. That’s why the short time we have left is critical. We’ve got less than a week to bring in the resources we need to stay competitive. There’s no “catching up” later — only a sprint that starts right now. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and split between the Battleground Wisconsin and Wes Moore: | | | | | | Let’s cross the finish line together, Derek. Elevate, Wes * | | | | ---|---|---|--- | AS GOES WISCONSIN, SO GOES THE NATION Our party is committed to advancing progressive values and ensuring Democratic victories up and down the ballot. name: Heather from Team VPP
subject: This is it, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
$1 to take back the House and save our democracy
| Hey friends, it’s Heather from the Voter Protection Project! As we officially kick off election year, I have an urgent request:

[Are you able to chip in just $1 to our grassroots movement to take back the House? $1 will allow you to join the fight to flip the House and stop Trump’s MAGA agenda. body:
Chip in $26 to make 2026 the year we flip the House and Senate |
#

name: Mark Kelly
subject: They’re not going to shut me up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.
Peter:
Pete Hegseth decided he's going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension.
I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head.
My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. Pete Hegseth wants to send a message to every single one that he will come after them if they say something he doesn’t like.
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.
Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it.
If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming.
**[And if you’re still with me, please: Split a donation between Heartland Patriots and me so we can fight back.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99076?refcode=em20260111-9921&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9921%2E614464%2EzMxw2y)**

name: John James
subject: Here’s our plan for 2026:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312
body:
| | | Friend, I wanted to give you a quick update on where our grassroots operations stand as we begin 2026. If we’re going to win this race, we have to go out into Michigan neighborhoods, knock on doors, and get real face time with voters. In 2024, we proved that grassroots campaigning works. We were able to reach thousands of voters, appeal to Michiganders who were undecided, and make connections throughout our community. **_This year, I plan to do the same, but I need your help._** **This is going to be the most competitive swing state in the country during the midterms. ** The corrupt Democrats are going to do whatever it takes to hold onto power in our state. _If we’re going to win this race, we need to rely on our co-pilots to help us spread our message— but getting that message out takes serious resources._

[**Can you pitch in now to help us build a campaign infrastructure that can reach every voter in Michigan?**](http://links.jjformichigan.com/u/click?_t=70fde66bc0554ca7a14c16f5ebafdbd9&_m=9abeba96f2d4444182315ad39a31666c&_e=6dkJG3QQmUY4ORYDYz0Yc7s5LJlyg--pcPOVLwjQmAz7EvbOiOCroIMEXbJx1TUaF-B4z3_vRymZWlUThviucdpZG4jvSx1V7fRDxGzYR6-XK_1MEIbE1Xe6F4URF2-N-O5SFZX6iDOwDTLhD-9PKlLAS_D6HdBZhv_LE6Erfoo-QtXK6S0-OP17hgNyFeXjMKBeDq_pVo2GXsST9N0yH90ZFedPcx4lRR7nMePC97i5vX2OjH7i9nKOenmj1wzSY5JqfPrjvC_hniciItsxeHgkjE8Xk-RCH96LCpDqXnusynB3_3FABch58VPB-eD32Nt43iXM47Zuu-mFDdfzp2f9pJNLx12dX1ODPRzkV1MCcYicyMaSr_7cgpje7-MvIBUWT_Y0uXTlIpFj_8inZSfnR123T93o6Tav-jlaRj4%3D)

subject: Poll: Mass voter eligibility challenges

body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Rome News-Tribune: Eligibility of 364,000 Georgia voters challenged [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/RNT_GeorgiaEligibilityChallenged.png]
Georgia and other states have an expansive legal statute that permits any voter to challenge the right to vote of any other voter in that county or municipality. Dark money voter suppression groups have allegedly used this legal tactic to threaten the voter eligibility of hundreds of thousands en masse in Georgia alone.
We want to hear from supporters in your area about this tactic. Will you take our one-click poll right away?
Team: Do you think political action groups should be able to mass question the eligibility of voters?

YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=011126_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=011126_1no&amount=15]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=011126_1&amount=20]

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: You are my lifeline, Peter
body:
That's why I need you more than ever.

| | | | [](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._uHQI0EbaQIHQ)Peter, not to be too blunt, but I'm counting on you.
As a top supporter, you know I'm a fighter. I stood by President Trump when those we thought were patriots turned their backs on him. Yet, I refused to back down, and the Left will never forgive me for it.
But you've been with me every step of the way, patriot. Your support has been my shield against the RINOS and the radical Left. Now, they're coming at me with everything they've got with double the donors and double the dark money.

clean_body: = It's Governor JB Pritzker. I’m emailing you today about New Hampshire’s Senate race because this is serious: Senate Republicans’ hand-picked candidate, John Sununu, jumped in to defeat Chris Pappas and flip this open Senate seat red. = Without Chris Pappas winning in New Hampshire, Democrats won’t have a chance at taking back a majority in the Senate. That’s why this race is being targeted by GOP super PACs and Republicans across the country. The NRSC — which pours millions into electing Republicans to the Senate — said they’re “all-in” on John Sununu. And polling shows: This race is a statistical dead heat between Chris Pappas and John Sununu. This means New Hampshire will see historic levels of outside spending, and we have to be ready to fight back. Chris is a proven fighter for working families — and he’s seen tough campaigns like this before. He knows it takes grassroots support to win a race like this. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Chris Pappas and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = I know Chris is the type of leader we need in the Senate —= With gratitude, JB Pritzker Governor of Illinois If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can .** Click here to . clean_body: Friend, don’t forget to sign Trump’s 1-year anniversary card. | | | | ANNIVERSARY ALERT! Just days remain until Trump’s 1-year anniversary as President. DON’T SHARE THIS WITH TRUMP BUT have you signed his card yet? President Trump received a beautiful message from you once and we’re confident that he’d love to see one from you AGAIN! That’s why YOU were one of the very few supporters selected to sign Trump’s card and add a personal message of praise, encouragement, or even constructive feedback. Don Jr., Kristi Noem, Karoline Leavitt, Marco Rubio and many other Trump allies have already signed this card. So, what’s the hold up? Your name will be proudly displayed on the official card delivered straight to President Trump. We’re confident that the boss will be devastated if he doesn’t see your name at the top! Now that we’ve officially entered a critical midterm year, we need your help to keep fighting. Thank you for your unwavering support. | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | $1,336. name: Mike Rogers
subject: I learned from last time, Friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rogers for Senate
body:
I’m stepping back in with clarity, discipline, and a plan to win.
| | | |
---
[](https://link.email.mikerogersforsenate.)
[]() Friend, we came up short last year.
**[19,006 votes or 0.34% short to be exact.](https://link.email.mikerogersforsenate.)**
**[But I’m back running for Senate out of the great state of Michigan once and again, and I can assure you that we will not have a repeat of 2024.](https://link.email.mikerogersforsenate.)**

[FLIP MICHIGAN RED](https://link.email.mikerogersforsenate.)
[]()
[_Let me share a few reasons why this time will be different:_](https://link.email.mikerogersforsenate.)
[**FIRST**](https://link.email.mikerogersforsenate.), during my first run for Senate, I was a longtime Congressman with little to no name ID. This cycle, I will be entering the race as an established candidate who earned the support of nearly 2.7 million Michiganders.
[**SECOND**](https://link.email.mikerogersforsenate.), President Trump's victory in my state was a watershed moment. Michigan was long seen as a key pillar to the “blue wall” – in other words, a state that consistently votes Democratic. We’re entering the midterms with an entirely different landscape.
[**THIRD**](https://link.email.mikerogersforsenate.), the Democrats are already running with their tail between their legs. Gary Peters, our incumbent Senator, decided he would rather quit his job than face me in a race he was sure he would lose.

[HELP MIKE WIN](https://link.email.mikerogersforsenate.)
[]()
This open race is a Republican’s best chance to flip a Michigan seat since 1994, Friend.
If I’m going to win, I will need a top-notch team by my side and it would mean the world if you would join me. I’m ready to get to work on day one and be a man you will be proud to call Michigan's next Senator.
**[To help prepare me for victory, I’m calling on every patriot reading this email to rush in my average donation of $17.50 or more right now. Will you step up and answer the call?](https://link.email.mikerogersforsenate.)**

[EXPAND TRUMPS SENATE MAJORITY](https://link.email.mikerogersforsenate.)
[]()
Thank you for reading,
\- Mike Rogers

name: American Media Watchdog
subject: Megyn Kelly announced one death that will send a chill down your spine

name: John McGuire
subject: You will never be able to walk again...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John McGuire for Virginia
body:
"You'll never walk again"
It wasn't a sniper round that broke me. It was a sentence.
Cold. Clinical. Final.
No combat. No explosion.
Just a doctor with a clipboard, handing me what felt like an obituary. And for a moment, I accepted it.
The war was over. My legs were done.
And the fire inside me? Flickering. But I'd walked darker roads.
I didn't quit in the military. Didn't quit growing up with no name, no future, no father.
And I wasn't about to quit in a hospital bed, just because of some sentence.
So I stood up. Bone by bone. Inch by inch. I walked again.
Then I ran. Then I never stopped.
My name is John McGuire. SEAL Sniper. Christian Conservative. Trump Republican.
I've buried men who never got their second chance. That's why I'll never waste mine.
But when I came home, I found a country I barely recognized, with weak men in charge. Our flag mocked. Faith erased.
And now the Left wants 2026 to be the year they take out Trump, and burn the rest behind him.
I've heard "you're done" before. I didn't accept it then.
And I sure as hell won't accept it now, from the Left, from the media, or from the cowards trying to finish what our enemies couldn't.
[So if you’re still in this fight, if you’ve got one more stand left in you, now’s the time. ](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/EWhjx54G7XyCZpohwd235e9T8Nklj6GB7LbW4woCe3sObwJxypvjedDfnXbGLDgjEYGNsEe86mySPTurIWy6Pf_UoElzTSnMyVfy8gpLSUqpHtfLs0VBAfjukmd9FfAdJyd_ilS89mtSCIRv-GAW4A2kCjOq-kXV6HS2EBkLI_sQehn-L_zGOSnEYlfzYvNABYs4-OVvlCv3ATU40HURYYSG8wZJVNXeHjcZX0xlSJG1HBJqhLMpm8zSHoopv8OK1sBtIGgFSeL_hL3YnzlTT9WqJ-bxu_oLQmgqZ9RpgAc4IuXDwE3v6g2Z0W31pPaB44S0iMR8aMpVbLu5_UJUxuPXzJBOqVbJg8w0TVqvGVpF1qfU5nQ-27dzYi0mwZwSsL-P3crqMbvnmtcndSMIQRT9OkILI6-iGBlr0fA2zCNKEMFlX_0Xf4h-t7HDLpS_6Zez8qVbpQVs5M-uocidoEy4y8MSZszNpFctzA6ni_s8bib72BP5yvDCMyGvTFoRrkjuSFrsf___upwAk9mwD_P4bphigxyxRsO2xrOVM6Piieg2-pYjQo0od-5x4wzkkqQhGDh04r0s9NwkmF2gxfzZOxrS6b3x7DLGHNLo_gmb18f9IXadSRMaIiKzR5z7u51GwSPYqZtM14CyKQANyS7qVLpKTz_HeN_mgmbglMUoXQgEZGVJ8XiQLRKmNcqsYpjCsHx2m7pL4chqM_np4zHgOHS6O4rtcPe8_jpoMSFGZMCuQvJJj2e-NoK2Qqu-s22cQoo3UJbIADKsgf3MeuDA711JAZNWbrNd_xABmnRChRpQY7-vxlVYe0b1lsJr7e1mXSVvl0TkP4UFttkEdSuLMzvUKgOfg-YM3pD5AHC7N_7hRHF_9kwg6bvwA6X_QLIvM-IO9CxxmE7bpA/-7kMJqQiwQGWBe7fijnjUuCGW-Rt7eRP/16)[STAND WITH MAGA HERE

name: Redistricting Action
subject: The DOJ’s crusade
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
These attacks on our electoral process cannot go unanswered.
|
---

Peter,
Right now, states are bracing for an unprecedented escalation in the Department of Justice’s crusade to suppress voters and spread distrust in our electoral process.
The DOJ is demanding full, unredacted voter roll data — including sensitive information like your driver’s license number and social security number — to share with the Department of Homeland Security. When states refuse to turn over this data, the DOJ is suing them; in 2025 alone, the DOJ filed lawsuits against 21 states and D.C.
States are putting up a fight against this craven attack on our electoral process. Both Republicans and Democrats have pushed back on this illegal and intrusive power grab by the federal government to control our elections.
**But the DOJ is threatening to sue any state that does not comply with its demands, and this fight will only intensify as we approach the 2026 midterms. **
[**Your donation to Redistricting Action will support the grassroots movement defending our democracy from these brazen assaults. clean_body: These attacks on our electoral process cannot go unanswered. | Peter, Right now, states are bracing for an unprecedented escalation in the Department of Justice’s crusade to suppress voters and spread distrust in our electoral process. The DOJ is demanding full, unredacted voter roll data — including sensitive information like your driver’s license number and social security number — to share with the Department of Homeland Security. When states refuse to turn over this data, the DOJ is suing them; in 2025 alone, the DOJ filed lawsuits against 21 states and D.C. States are putting up a fight against this craven attack on our electoral process. Both Republicans and Democrats have pushed back on this illegal and intrusive power grab by the federal government to control our elections. But the DOJ is threatening to sue any state that does not comply with its demands, and this fight will only intensify as we approach the 2026 midterms. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Despite vanishingly little evidence that noncitizens can cast votes, the DOJ is weaponizing this data to spread false claims of election fraud that sow doubt in our democracy. This has nothing to do with ensuring integrity in our elections. It is simply another attempt by Trump and his allies to undermine state authority over elections so that they can sweep in and keep their grip on power. It’s a shocking reversal of the DOJ’s historical legacy of protecting voting rights, particularly for marginalized groups that have been excluded from our electoral process for far too long. = Thank you for standing up for our democracy in this moment. — Redistricting Action Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from Redistricting Action by automated text message. clean_body: You have been selected to participate in this important nationwide PATRIOT VOTER VERIFICATION survey project. I tried to mail this to your house, Peter - but I never heard back from you. It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise. I'm sending this message directly to your inbox because you are one of our top Patriots in your area. I know this is longer than our usual messages, but please take a moment to read it from start to finish - and please don't forget to Thank you for everything you do. \- Steve Scalise ORIGINAL MESSAGEPATRIOT VOTER VERIFICATION SURVEY You have been selected to participate in this important nationwide PATRIOT VOTER VERIFICATION survey project. I offered to conduct this project as part of our Republican Party's mission to ensure that every single patriotic American citizen is registered to vote and fully empowered to guide our nation's future. Your record stands out as a proud American, law-abiding taxpayer, and a registered voter living in: your area. Please ensure our records are as accurate as possible by completing the VERIFICATION SURVEY below. You are identified as a loyal patriot, so I am really counting on your prompt response. This project's results will be incomplete if we don't hear from you. And frankly, with everything at stake, your voice is urgently needed in our country's system of self-government. As House Majority Leader, I am proud of everything I am doing to help President Trump enact his America First agenda. And I will not stop. Not ever. But the Democrats are spreading lies about the policies and getting their base of supporters riled up. We've already seen left-wing "resistance" activists in communities across the country (including near your part of your area). And we are seeing Democrat Party committees and liberal PACs smashing fundraising records. All due to anti-Trump hatred. If loyal patriots can't organize and mobilize on our own, the Woke Democrats will take back power and shut down our MAGA agenda. And they will spend President Trump's final two years in office attacking him with more Witch Hunts and impeachment drives. That is why your immediate response is so important, Peter. I was honored to be selected by my colleagues to serve as Majority Leader. But I do not lead "from the top down." I listen to the grassroots . . . to patriotic men and women like you who love our country, share my conservative values, and want the best for our kids and grandkids. And I am confident that the best way to strengthen our movement - and score big victories at the polls in 2026 - is by continuing to work shoulder to shoulder with you and other caring citizens. To defeat the Woke Left and pass the rest of President Trump's MAGA agenda, we'll need REAL Americans to vote in large numbers. And we'll need them to cast informed votes. That means pushing back against left-wing propaganda at every turn through next November. So please complete your VERIFICATION SURVEY and submit it TODAY. And when you respond, I urge you to include one important gift of $250, $100, $50, $35, or any amount you can spare to my campaign. As I push the Trump Agenda through the House, forcing tough, narrow votes and speaking up for facts and the truth, I am coming under relentless attack from the left-wing campaign machine. So please complete our voter verification survey as soon as possible. And don't forget to include your important gift of $250, $100, $50, or $35. Every dollar will fuel my fight to pass more pro-America policies and mobilize a surge of MAGA voters to the polls next year. Thank you and God bless! Steve ScaliseHouse Majority Leader Q1. Are you a registered voter in your area?. Do you intend to vote in the 2026 midterm elections? . Did you vote in person in the 2024 presidential election?. Do you want your state's law enforcement officials to cooperate with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE), when it comes to detaining illegal aliens? - HOW IMPORTANT IS IT THAT YOUR PUBLIC OFFICIALS WORK TO: 1\. Secure the border.\. Protect parents' rights. 3\. Cut the debt.\. Stop socialism. \- Democrat Leadership formed an anti-Trump task force \- More than a dozen Attorneys General are suing the Trump Administration\- A House Democrat just introduced 7 Articles of Impeachment If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT! We're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority:| | | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Look, being a former Republican isn’t my whole story.
My mother immigrated from the Philippines as an organic chemist. I followed in her footsteps and majored in biochemistry before I went to Law School to pursue my true passion – Constitutional Law.
**Looking back, the Constitution was my first love.** At 10, I was obsessed with the Watergate Scandal. (_Little did I know that was child's play compared to what Trump would do_).
I know that sounds boring and nerdy, but the promise of our democracy, freedoms, and the rule of law fascinates me – and for years I _thought_ Republicans upheld those same ideals.
**I was so wrong.** When I finally got a peek under the hood and saw what these lying, sleazebag, horrible MAGA loyalists were doing to our country, I couldn’t stomach it.
Let me be straight with you: **Republicans are failing America, and as someone who’s been fighting Trump for years, I know exactly how to stop them. **
It requires not running the same plays, election after election, hoping we’ll see different results. It means being bold and not afraid to fight fire with fire – like I’ve been doing at the cost of my career and reputation.
Look, Democrats’ success last November proved there’s hope. Trump may think he’s a king on a throne, but his wannabe dictatorship is built on a house of cards, and we are this close to toppling it.
If we can take back Congress for Democrats, we can cut Trump’s MAGA agenda off at the knees.**To do it, we need a fearless candidate who knows what makes the MAGA machine tick, and who can rewrite the playbook and WIN. **
[**That’s why I’m running, Peter. I’ve seen firsthand the devastation wrought by the selfishness and narcissism of Trump’s MAGA regime. We cannot let this be our future. First, I quit the Republican Party. Then, I founded the Lincoln Project. Now, I’m running for Congress. Peter, I know how to beat MAGA better than anyone. I know what makes these people tick. So I’m officially running for Congress in NY-12. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Look, being a former Republican isn’t my whole story. My mother immigrated from the Philippines as an organic chemist. I followed in her footsteps and majored in biochemistry before I went to Law School to pursue my true passion – Constitutional Law. Looking back, the Constitution was my first love. At 10, I was obsessed with the Watergate Scandal. (Little did I know that was child's play compared to what Trump would do). I know that sounds boring and nerdy, but the promise of our democracy, freedoms, and the rule of law fascinates me – and for years I thought Republicans upheld those same ideals. I was so wrong. When I finally got a peek under the hood and saw what these lying, sleazebag, horrible MAGA loyalists were doing to our country, I couldn’t stomach it. Let me be straight with you: Republicans are failing America, and as someone who’s been fighting Trump for years, I know exactly how to stop them. It requires not running the same plays, election after election, hoping we’ll see different results. It means being bold and not afraid to fight fire with fire – like I’ve been doing at the cost of my career and reputation. Look, Democrats’ success last November proved there’s hope. Trump may think he’s a king on a throne, but his wannabe dictatorship is built on a house of cards, and we are this close to toppling it. If we can take back Congress for Democrats, we can cut Trump’s MAGA agenda off at the knees.To do it, we need a fearless candidate who knows what makes the MAGA machine tick, and who can rewrite the playbook and WIN. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- This is a fight for the future of our country, and I’m proud to have you with me, Peter. Forward, George Conway Democrat for Congress in NY-12 Josh Harder for Congress PO Box 4220 Manteca, CA 95337 United States
